If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and Off the Sidelines here: [_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q42025_ots-ossoff-split_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121690678/590260982/-116537968?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.20_OTS-Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDYzZjMwOC0wMGRlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Foue1zgw8FsIx9LWoVcgYjlAc41SuUCMD7N8Qiuwis=) Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term. There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections. _But I have you._ Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority. Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.** Yes, this election will be tough. But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. _Let’s do it again._ So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and Off the Sidelines today. Here’s the link again: [_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q42025_ots-ossoff-split_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121690679/590260983/-116537968?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.20_OTS-Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDYzZjMwOC0wMGRlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Foue1zgw8FsIx9LWoVcgYjlAc41SuUCMD7N8Qiuwis=) Thank you, Jon | © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Daniele Monroe-Moreno
subject: From all of us

body:
We wish you and those you love a very happy holiday season. | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT1IBVfzOrqxt30R4iT-GDafBJDvuHpAgsW6tC74mUNP626d_kjWXIAeqiBI9fY2yBBTEBQeceTUBYNQl0K7kJSYlJgw71oWtPmFgq82v_11feZSbHaxpAK6lQhvWf1ZTHwUeDH24_etGu1awcAnrO7eD8BRcgROAXQGOs1z9JouGqnI1gwthVqYkNJa1AvphLQvwNVVEO2CgvSceR-QQJcOvSAYI6eOuPZsKExhEEXqfxoSw5di1-u2wkXV1OHcz8ennV1E6JAlRqc98HkbRPfTRvhtgJdJZxU3r_IMSoQpfOPIncSMzvu7G1In76PdWE/4mm/pG42udoHSDeFUsZwjUa62w/h0/h001.oOQrp6oRsUcieghWmyr-3QSpw3U2DjY4M2p2wzLxjE0)
---
From all of us at NV Dems, we wish you and those you love a very happy holiday season.
As we look back on the year behind us and take a moment to recharge for what’s ahead. Everyone deserves a warm meal and a safe place to call home. We are a community and all have something to share, it may be just our time, compassion, resources and love. We’re incredibly thankful to have you by our side, giving what you can to advocate for Nevada’s families.
Thank you for all you do,
— DMM

The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules.

clean_body: We wish you and those you love a very happy holiday season. | | | | From all of us at NV Dems, we wish you and those you love a very happy holiday season. As we look back on the year behind us and take a moment to recharge for what’s ahead. Everyone deserves a warm meal and a safe place to call home. We are a community and all have something to share, it may be just our time, compassion, resources and love. We’re incredibly thankful to have you by our side, giving what you can to advocate for Nevada’s families. Thank you for all you do, — DMM The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. 🔵The _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ will restore and strengthen the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ – protecting the right to vote from ridiculous Republican voter suppression tactics.

[**If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to step up and protect our Democracy – this is it.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71091?t=10&akid=23749%2E4449941%2EWxz5bv) [**We still need to raise $2,037 before 11:59 PM to meet our goal, and your donation could make all the difference.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71091?t=11&akid=23749%2E4449941%2EWxz5bv) [**Don’t waste your chance, team.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71091?t=12&akid=23749%2E4449941%2EWxz5bv)

After so much chaos – allowing a government shutdown, refusing to extend the Affordable Care Act tax credits, going back and forth on releasing the Epstein files, and skyrocketing costs across the country – voters are fed up with Trump.

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10658?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=1690%2E49239%2Er99iLQ) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10656?t=10&akid=1690%2E49239%2Er99iLQ)

Thank you,
Haley

body:
Don’t skip past this — it’s about Trump and Epstein.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121691397/590288109/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGY0NzFlNC0wNmRlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NTewLk8_z6bksk78w3uOOQHA3YqnR-u41wHVsG5yKoE=)

Donald Trump is once again trying to silence anyone who holds him accountable.
Yesterday, the Trump Department of Justice defied federal law by refusing to release the full Epstein files, despite a clear legal deadline set by Congress.
**_This wasn’t an accident. It was a deliberate cover-up._**
But I, along with my Democratic colleagues on the Oversight Committee, refused to stay quiet. I called it out. I demanded accountability. And now Trump and his allies are lashing out because they don’t want the American people to see what’s really in those files.
Let me be clear: no one is above the law — not Donald Trump, not his DOJ, and not the powerful people who think they can bury the truth forever.

This is serious, folks.
Trump’s administration is defying Congress. They’re stonewalling subpoenas. They’re protecting the powerful instead of the victims.
_And they’re counting on people like us to get tired and look away._
**But I won’t — and I know good Democrats like you won’t either.**
**[Listen, holding the line against this kind of corruption takes resources — and it takes resolve. So if you can, chip in right now to support this fight. name: The Democratic Party
subject: When you donate to the DNC…
body:
---
Derek, When you make a donation to the Democratic National Committee, you are contributing to the organization best positioned to make a difference in the midterms next year. So that's what we are asking you to do today. To contribute $7 before the holidays: $7 because we only need to flip a handful of seats to win back Congress — and the earlier we can invest in key states, the better positioned we’ll be. $7 because the _only_ way we’ll be able to scale up our on-the-ground organizing work and ensure Democrats’ message is reaching voters is if we have plenty of resources. $7 because the DNC can move money where it is needed, when it is needed to elect Democrats in the races you care about most next year. Derek, our strength is in the people like you who power our work. With 2026 rapidly approaching, we're asking: [**Can Democrats everywhere count on you to make a $7 contribution directly to the Democratic National Committee today? We'll put your donation right to work electing Democrats up and down the ballot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251220_5581_fr&refcode2=5581_22930333_5MiSYI&akid=5581%2E22930333%2E5MiSYI) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251220_5581_fr&refcode2=5581_22930333_5MiSYI&akid=5581%2E22930333%2E5MiSYI)**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22298%2E878179%2EWEu2TZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22298%2E878179%2EWEu2TZ).**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
Peter,
If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. It didn’t stop when the FBI wanted to talk to me and other members of Congress. Because now the Department of Defense has announced that it is escalating its investigation into me.
All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.
If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter.
I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.
If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.
And if you’d be willing to help support me, please:
**[Split a donation between Heartland Patriots and me. It would mean a lot.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98666?refcode=em20251220-9853&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9853%2E614464%2EUd0u49)**

| | Re-electing Zoe is only one of several steps California Democrats need to take in this fight against Trump. I am very mindful of the state of things in this country. Donald Trump does not believe in free and fair elections: period, full stop. **And no one has been a bigger advocate for free and fair democratic elections than Zoe. She held Trump accountable as a member of the January 6th Select Committee and stood with me in the charge to fight back against unlawful Republican redistricting in Texas. ** Now, it is all on the line in 2026. I thank you and everyone who stood up not just for our democracy, but for those who are feeling intimidated, for those who are struggling to get by, and for those who believe in the notion of checks and balances. By turning out this Election Day, you issued a stunning rebuke to Trump and his toxic agenda. But the fight goes on – and we need Zoe back in Congress to continue to lead us forward.

I am very mindful of the state of things in this country. Donald Trump does not believe in free and fair elections: period, full stop. And no one has been a bigger advocate for free and fair democratic elections than Zoe. She held Trump accountable as a member of the January 6th Select Committee and stood with me in the charge to fight back against unlawful Republican redistricting in Texas. Now, it is all on the line in 2026. I thank you and everyone who stood up not just for our democracy, but for those who are feeling intimidated, for those who are struggling to get by, and for those who believe in the notion of checks and balances. name: Tim Scott
subject: FINAL HOURS: help us finish 2025 strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

Thank you for standing with us in 2025. Just as you powered our historic wins in 2024, you've helped us lay the foundation for defending, and growing, the Senate Majority in 2026.

But I need to ask you for one more favor this year.

The Democrats are raising millions, energizing their voters, and expanding their Senate targets for next year.

If we let up in the final days of 2025, it could cost us everything in 2026.

clean_body: Peter, Thank you for standing with us in 2025. Just as you powered our historic wins in 2024, you've helped us lay the foundation for defending, and growing, the Senate Majority in 2026. But I need to ask you for one more favor this year. The Democrats are raising millions, energizing their voters, and expanding their Senate targets for next year. If we let up in the final days of 2025, it could cost us everything in 2026. Your support right now will determine how strong we are heading into the new year. God bless America, Tim Scott NRSC Chairman | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5f9cvhbtsbohc16u4t2nbt708svlvj0g055fjt0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv8vvnconkqjgte6oifdm014nmga2hcjd7vvgago_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)
---
This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we'll send you a copy -- as our thank-you for carrying Charlie's mission forward.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zek5h3i9579lf58tt37p2ao8o3t8let6f5klf3to_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcvnrc9kaqea2ftd3mk0a9i8csep44uqv3djdjog_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)
---
Friend, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zinc2550b1sms1696nv8mk8nuf2ehkbv1s2rj2v0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv85ib3oopmha42b6rvqmftoec1dks5ivm3qg2j0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)
---
Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Friend, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo15lo4j8l6t99v8o7rvkf3f6tm093pio2m143ro_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvinnglpjgl0felmk0nnlq2mgvlc7pai9gb1atmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)**
---
**P.S._Stop, in the Name of God_** is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord.

**[When you make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, we'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book to your door.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0k05j1imq8s76m0g00f4b1k28durhf949dqvbog_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi62o72clh2bs)**

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Friend, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Al Canata
subject: How would you grade Congress
body:
We know it’s important for Congress to know where they stand in defending the taxpayer...

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7e70vui0lf67pqdt3kvgci1a531v7m3riscmrfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)
Friend,

National Taxpayers Union is up on Capitol Hill meeting with your representatives on your behalf.

They know who we are. They use our research and data to make decisions. They call us to testify as fiscally responsible, tax policy experts. They take our meetings as we lobby for good tax policy and the like.

_We know it’s important for Congress to know where they stand in defending the taxpayer..._

Every year, the National Taxpayers Union rates every member of Congress their actual votes — _every vote that affects taxes, spending, and debt_. Our only constituency is the overburdened American taxpayer.

**This is one way NTU helps you know who is on your side and helps you hold those representatives accountable.**

I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union. Our mission is to achieve favorable, pro-taxpayer policy outcomes using the most effective team on Capitol Hill and in the states.

The National Taxpayers Union is the “Voice of America’s Taxpayers,” and we are using that voice to hold Congress accountable for its fiscal irresponsibility.

**Your generous support makes it all possible. Please click below to show your support.**
[Donate Now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp5r5btqc46kgm7ce6ckqj2mniltsjrli0acin1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)
**National Taxpayers Union is reminding members of Congress that they have a responsibility to the taxpayers.**

The Taxpayer Score measures the strength of support a member of Congress has for reducing wasteful government spending, opposing higher taxes, and often opposing burdensome regulations that can stifle U.S. economic growth.

Each score can range between zero and 100. NTU doesn’t expect any representative to score 100, _which is why we grade on a curve_ , but in general, a higher score is better because it means a member of Congress voted to spend less money.

**The Taxpayer Score is both the fairest and most accurate guide available on congressional spending and the easiest for taxpayers to understand.**

We know putting public pressure on lawmakers to support pro-taxpayer policies is one of the best ways to support our lobbying efforts on Capitol Hill.

This is how the National Taxpayers Union is empowering taxpayers to hold their representatives accountable.

[Please don’t sit back and let members of Congress continue to fail taxpayers. Donate $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to hold politicians accountable to taxpayers >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3mlv5oh3jqh61ogii6rf0h6tibho3dhl8sqmppo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbia8oboukamvl4bm1bo0jnrs9pp3m9q1fep9ljo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ljkat47lg1t8uva32eo81lbatbknceha7hi7m0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zod2vhc16q3ut19h92vmrjpcfrg46ofor86cshdo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh15dhigl21r84p2cv16vgufg2uh2quok4m6961g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zudhb7s5aruv6fodpfm68qr8gedrebq97r89gq9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7rpmn01m7j7kq02o7v5q5ft3vpi08fen7dmlip0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cpi66or6c3h2bs)
Thank you,

Al Canata

National Taxpayers Union

name: Stop MAGA
subject: Why was Boebert’s Dem opponent on Fox News???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
We took a lot of flak for going on these conservative platforms, here’s why we did it.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pMXA0ojaPh1Xga4hmSQWB2iFYCbL4i6lvd0m4Q6PiAIn6jefpSNtaMmxSzkC7pH4iTf8AHMs7o9_542mk2jFeI8MMPEbvZ8oKR2lzVY1DdkiJI4KhaeyMBVo15MuQ4jYH8bzKkD21rE1gAkZgzW_zQCFuXpvOugIOCMPUKg5KTp7_8ewI548MNeAlBuEMzbOZVpO_AN_yaUG_ZhwpXsHylrqMbQRyJdP&c=R-CIyx8HvVrR0-w8LUSWEPXS0JMVSbq2xu0TpARENF7l3Ppwdj1OEg==&ch=muZvimEUgaVe91apImvgcP3IR-Q83HP0gyNKlGGNQXS1c8pZcvcVSg==)
---
|

Peter,
Colorado's energy utility Excel energy cut power to over 100,000 Coloradans because of 60-85 mph winds. In response, Trisha Calvarese, Lauren Boebert's Democratic opponent, called out Excel on Twitter.
The Denver metro area's local Fox News affiliate, Fox 31 KDVR, saw our post and brought Trisha on to discuss it. Earlier in the week Trisha also appeared on Conservative talk radio station KHOW to talk about our race.
We took a lot of flak for going on these conservative platforms, here's why we did it.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pMXA0ojaPh1Xga4hmSQWB2iFYCbL4i6lvd0m4Q6PiAIn6jefpSNtaMmxSzkC7pH4iTf8AHMs7o9_542mk2jFeI8MMPEbvZ8oKR2lzVY1DdkiJI4KhaeyMBVo15MuQ4jYH8bzKkD21rE1gAkZgzW_zQCFuXpvOugIOCMPUKg5KTp7_8ewI548MNeAlBuEMzbOZVpO_AN_yaWPCmgqYYS5AlmdIR2LrvjB&c=R-CIyx8HvVrR0-w8LUSWEPXS0JMVSbq2xu0TpARENF7l3Ppwdj1OEg==&ch=muZvimEUgaVe91apImvgcP3IR-Q83HP0gyNKlGGNQXS1c8pZcvcVSg==)
---
Even if every registered Democrat in Colorado's 4th (Boebert's district) came out to vote in 2026 it would still not be enough to flip this seat. The path to victory here requires that we win Unaffiliated voters and even peel off some GOP voters.
We aim to persuade these voters, not by trying to out-conservative someone like Boebert. That's a losing playbook. We do it through the power of our populist policies, and with a high energy candidate voters can get excited about.
MAGA claims to be for the working class and against the elites but in reality their movement is the inverse. Our populism is real, we support the little guy and are taking on Big Tech, Big Ag, and Big Pharma, busting their monopolies, strengthening the middle class and actually ending America's blood soaked foreign policy.
To spread this unabashed left-populist message we have to meet voters where they are \- on the TV and radio platforms that they use to get their news, including Fox News and conservative talk radio stations like KHOW.
This strategy is working -- in 2024 when Boebert and Trisha went head to head, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming VP Harris by 6 pts. And just a few weeks ago, the Chair of the Colorado Libertarian party became a Democrat citing Trisha as the reason for her defection.
[This is how we splinter the MAGA base - and win. Will you rush a donation $25 to our campaign to help us keep going on conservative media, holding town halls in Republican counties, and building the coalition we need to defeat Boebert, take back this district, and flip the house in 2026?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pMXA0ojaPh1Xga4hmSQWB2iFYCbL4i6lvd0m4Q6PiAIn6jefpSNtaMmxSzkC7pH4A4WM4FytVDkjmD7pJyr9hNqD27z-vDwCSAqmmCWv2cQQoS4u0QJw9SBLOSlP-uOukriUi08Cmzb5My3rt_F6YmGfeMS9tmJa7M8IVYPrBlfqXDPzMtDbBFEG4K2xyUk4Mfwvz2jEMfXppZtrF6kNfhmkhnOLreB2sJxT4xgYwjg=&c=R-CIyx8HvVrR0-w8LUSWEPXS0JMVSbq2xu0TpARENF7l3Ppwdj1OEg==&ch=muZvimEUgaVe91apImvgcP3IR-Q83HP0gyNKlGGNQXS1c8pZcvcVSg==)

subject: Why was Boebert’s Dem opponent on Fox News???

clean_body: We took a lot of flak for going on these conservative platforms, here’s why we did it. | | | | | == | Peter, Colorado's energy utility Excel energy cut power to over 100,000 Coloradans because of 60-85 mph winds. In response, Trisha Calvarese, Lauren Boebert's Democratic opponent, called out Excel on Twitter. The Denver metro area's local Fox News affiliate, Fox 31 KDVR, saw our post and brought Trisha on to discuss it. Earlier in the week Trisha also appeared on Conservative talk radio station KHOW to talk about our race. We took a lot of flak for going on these conservative platforms, here's why we did it. | == Even if every registered Democrat in Colorado's 4th (Boebert's district) came out to vote in 2026 it would still not be enough to flip this seat. The path to victory here requires that we win Unaffiliated voters and even peel off some GOP voters. We aim to persuade these voters, not by trying to out-conservative someone like Boebert. That's a losing playbook. We do it through the power of our populist policies, and with a high energy candidate voters can get excited about. MAGA claims to be for the working class and against the elites but in reality their movement is the inverse. Our populism is real, we support the little guy and are taking on Big Tech, Big Ag, and Big Pharma, busting their monopolies, strengthening the middle class and actually ending America's blood soaked foreign policy. To spread this unabashed left-populist message we have to meet voters where they are \- on the TV and radio platforms that they use to get their news, including Fox News and conservative talk radio stations like KHOW. This strategy is working -- in 2024 when Boebert and Trisha went head to head, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming VP Harris by 6 pts. And just a few weeks ago, the Chair of the Colorado Libertarian party became a Democrat citing Trisha as the reason for her defection. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | God speed, Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfcldpnqfh3l672rn3a87tk3icgqv5dkoui0nu88_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztvn50m1gf8uldki5k9ror2pihnqdfukv5jg0e7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)
---
This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we'll send you a copy -- as our thank-you for carrying Charlie's mission forward.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmhcml9skjk90f2qlp8d4b27euvbs462vs9rn7v8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpat6l95qvf75gq3itjbk4fqmogamlinhh9hflmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)
---
Friend, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvj9nmedf89k4pt9u869gfjer6v7ag1u0qdrff98_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zliqrb6mu6772v0iipvfiv2qbtp1d0gp3jj31dl0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)
---
Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Friend, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjpa6qonb3of526o7gg6qgvsf7v8js8n4s5al6m8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeh5s7gtp3shh4eionclbieh5ph15fp3jn45u3i8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)**
---
**P.S._Stop, in the Name of God_** is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord.

**[When you make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, we'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book to your door.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6kui96560eguafiv7l5bvpj8h7bt4865n6hc5h8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cph6co71c9h2bs)**

clean_body: Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. | | | | | Friend, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Friend, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Friend, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: He's losing it
subject: It’s time to take the keys away from Trump
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gqZF3tKebD_9y_Bbf-PKYPr8ZHeMUWTEEK1drVhVMx9Ck8xxeQjPusdf4JGcP27QrvIr7lq6VaVcdFSi1-8QvsCljPwBpIAaKvLju8T92K9rMhKjusWTTdVgxc2qMbycLKWjXDM4hPPx2P3Am_Z5w6NlV8mtzA3wd37SsCKhgMJC4R8L9BICWhkhNegBHusydsJcrhmokXIhUFTPo0uDfvsIA3sFaR28jAKlly6Maao=&c=lQuisDNlm1CHqiurjrA9nKH5Qfs1KVMg1siTUakSrMtbKSwJpnVFxg==&ch=odfJTpKPwXn47H9NI9_mI0RPdt6zrMg-bCtV3_IMoUcSpdH3ao7qyQ==)

Peter,
They say power reveals a man.
Right now, it's revealing a man who is going completely batshit insane.
We are watching the mental unraveling of Donald Trump in real-time. It's not embarrassing anymore, it's frightening and dangerous.
In the past week, Trump danced on the grave of director Rob Reiner, who was tragically murdered alongside his wife by their own son, implying he died because of his "Trump Derangement Syndrome." Then, he turned the White House into a wall of petty grievances, installing plaques under portraits of Joe Biden and Barack Obama filled with unhinged insults.

The only check on Trump's insanity is Congress. Because of his reckless behavior and gross lack of critical thinking skills, healthcare premiums are about to skyrocket almost 80%. We need leaders who will restore the legislative branch, hold this administration accountable for its crimes, and block a madman from dragging us into a global conflict.

subject: Trump met with Epstein’s lawyer to plot third term coup
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NBFTFzWrnwFgm7at5EIwavz9Kz4FTLDO8AEWWM_FAQgdc1I0tM8HibRaNcnt-hYwd8bijA0Chlr-IwlG620ihMfzQocMaydJAB1hcsuyHzd3-FLojMIO6GfvoH0-izM3hW8CuL4nfQ5H90WIPRCj-tT5yfHbkBU6f_U_638ykBczDFaMp1SUJ0jGz86QbPRGRzqsQWCrWZi3EpZ4tkzkE-rweyIYKrkiaEvRfdRlfe0=&c=2ySVATZsB_S-4SQBCDGhwApf1fn0ASNNQmeunhlu6IC4uOgzDBuydQ==&ch=GEleN_izeQWEhUM5Wa8wtDxmdCX0KSEXcILmqpVRXTXJDJJay-oUTA==)
---
| Peter,
The gears are turning.
Just days ago at a White House reception, billionaire megadonor Miriam Adelson stood on stage and offered Donald Trump a $250 million check to run for a third term.
Now, reports are coming out that Trump met in private with Alan Dershowitz, Jeffrey Epstein's former lawyer, to plot loopholes for Trump to run for a third term. Dershowitz is currently working on a book set to be released this Spring titled Could President Trump Constitutionally Serve a Third Term?
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NBFTFzWrnwFgm7at5EIwavz9Kz4FTLDO8AEWWM_FAQgdc1I0tM8HibRaNcnt-hYwBVgTVE2I7iuooJUkTrUyiuZZdL7UCR7hFePx2OSsJTdLnS6b2sSHBeCleiim7HaMCT8-kZIzUR3fq0-JtAp-HcatUia_TyeDiMLUEPmJCiCrPM2A2kNFZ_W-MWfBHgW2Pe2fcxIjqhOFLNLoa5ZQxN7NBh6igLEzUQJFs8sfJbPeHr8w7tly0g==&c=2ySVATZsB_S-4SQBCDGhwApf1fn0ASNNQmeunhlu6IC4uOgzDBuydQ==&ch=GEleN_izeQWEhUM5Wa8wtDxmdCX0KSEXcILmqpVRXTXJDJJay-oUTA==)
---

The money is on the table and the plot is being discussed behind closed doors.
Defend Our Courts just helped orchestrate a massive victory in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court election, but the fight has already moved. Trump's billionaire-back machine is now laser-focused on flipping the Supreme Courts in Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan in 2026.
If we don't hold the line in these three critical swing states, MAGA will be able to secure the courts they need to give Trump another viable path to secure power for as long as he wants.
[Our courts are the only thing standing between us and a permanent MAGA dictatorship. Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare right now to help Defend Our Courts build the firewall in AZ, GA, and MI?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NBFTFzWrnwFgm7at5EIwavz9Kz4FTLDO8AEWWM_FAQgdc1I0tM8HibRaNcnt-hYwSD3HySlkF38mHzKFArLo9ByXweYhqaRu5shDHYbohtS811J3U0GoSfdG7Dpm1T3qh487IJ-AB97AG2ayyMn2cqWlWw2T4akzgIZJfTAhRCBInrP1MLACLAe1sG1UniYRL_gSTOmSr-UwV8I4zaEQqK8QTTQk8yIYbHs_RlF8oKsfHp6SM-x7uVFU5Yj4Pk3v&c=2ySVATZsB_S-4SQBCDGhwApf1fn0ASNNQmeunhlu6IC4uOgzDBuydQ==&ch=GEleN_izeQWEhUM5Wa8wtDxmdCX0KSEXcILmqpVRXTXJDJJay-oUTA==)

| When MAGA came for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, they kicked the hornet's nest.
But at first, Democrats had brought a knife to a gun fight. Dems were caught off guard and unprepared for the aggressive tactics MAGA brought to the fight: Republican operatives were showing up at every county fair, every parade, every town hall and public event across PA.
Dems were asleep at the wheel, missing in action, caught unaware.
Outmatched and outgunned, Defend Our Courts worked to galvanize the Democratic base to rally to this fight--all while Trump demanded that the GOP rig the rules of the game to try and beat us before the Midterm even began.
In Texas, Republicans rammed through an aggressive gerrymander that would eliminate up to 5 Dem blue seats. Other GOP-controlled states followed suit--and it looked like PA could be next, if MAGA swept the supreme court races in November.
A perfect storm was brewing that would have resulted in a shocking GOP gerrymander of Pennsylvania, a scenario Democrats neither expected nor prepared for.
We defeated MAGA in PA in November. And now the courts have come to the rescue yet again: two federal judges just struck down Texas' rigged map, delivering Trump a devastating blow.
---

In 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states: Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. Fair elections, abortion rights, and voting rights are at stake in each of these crucial states.
Defend Our Courts is rushing to the fight to stop MAGA in each of these contests. Our team, and our army of nearly 100,000 individual grassroots supporters from across the country, are battle-tested and seasoned warriors.
Now, it's PAYBACK time, baby. Now that PA is saved, Democrats can do a tit for tat redistricting in even more states if other GOP states don't back down.
Our stunning win in PA shows that when Democrats fight with courage, resolve, and strength, we win.
[We need you in this fight to the bitter end. Trump and MAGA are not giving up--in fact, they're mad as hell for the brutal defeat we gave them in PA. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Now, fresh leaked documents reveal a coverup targeting America’s seniors: mysterious illnesses, sudden collapses explained away as “normal aging,” while hidden risks multiply in silence.

If you were born before January 1, 1965, this is about you—and the facts Washington fears most.

[Watch RFK Jr’s urgent 2025 reveal before it disappears.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=5dd00cb3039c472cabede0c0e0b63d65&_e=VNPhpxubSaVGXLx66c2saJEHAoig4R5JJon2-zj8cGOeOhyZ5-c_JUBHOQLafFzboJqQwYZ_pKsrhwK-kWsL6J3PVHZ6SD3T4boo7y6u9S5PtiU90L7qSp5wUx85t6dF1rcS1dt9A9-g3YvOonchifr-p80E1th4wR6zrrw8-vxNOzCXh-34pTspWU3ZpvXJIhmDUEnffoopnSZgzem7HPLojXtr31Zs7FTLO52q3ong_CsG17wATvwfeC8ugo2MQD-U1fdCApjbDpzQnmao-r4vQg8C1RNHXCL1TQXOJ_UXG_oq6PbcbFTqAfC2AlbLVwz4yoqkQu6n51nYgt0gv-2E_EGBF1MEAhIbzg9MKwSIq-bvRlzjUbph2mxEJMYdARY4k24SDqvS1nRvhNRGGpxZ1ceXnYYYfnUPLIbCRf5kSVTGONqjANUYZuuRtBZwmszkpCsvbRq1I2xSE7gRQPZiegmv7KrxYZOLuTctruJAyCtJl8zf9PGbPiy43MdXn1IgUZ82d_3DMIObe54TLjf8S1FeIbfCiVVhWPACsf-e33B8KSlVLQI_f5Fg72NYG69zVkOMPYJw260zBNuVNw%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

# IN YOUR WEEKLY BULLETIN:
---
|
---
| |
Power, accountability, and a cold plunge into controversy. This week’s Sunday Bulletin cuts through the noise with sharp investigative reporting, gripping regional headlines, high-stakes sports moves, political tension in Harrisburg, and editorials that pull no punches:
**INVESTIGATIVE** : Senate President Pro Tempore Kim Ward breaks her silence on Gov. Josh Shapiro, alleging a pattern of hostility toward strong women—and fueling new scrutiny as lawmakers probe taxpayer-funded security upgrades and transparency inside the administration.
**REGIONAL NEWS** : From a fatal truck crash in Horsham and a Montgomery Township fire chief’s sudden resignation to a $10.5M public-works project in Margate, our region grapples with tragedy, transition, and big public decisions. Plus, Wildwood braces for a daring Polar Bear Plunge as winter sets in.
**SPORTS** : The Phillies signal a future shift in the outfield with the Adolis García signing—raising big questions about Justin Crawford’s role and the team’s direction as fans read between the lines.
**POLITICS** : Harrisburg heats up as subpoenas fly, accountability clashes with executive power, and questions mount about leadership style, spending, and what voters deserve to know.
**EDITORIAL** : From a blistering response to a president’s words in the aftermath of tragedy to sharp commentary on government dysfunction, cultural erasure, and the cost of abandoning common sense—our opinion pages challenge readers to think harder and demand better.
---

body:

# Sunday, December 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1913, the first modern crossword puzzle appeared in the _New York World_ ’s Sunday supplement. Created by journalist Arthur Wynne, the diamond-shaped puzzle helped launch a pastime that would become a daily tradition for millions. [See the first puzzle here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQAL_GdEZ4MRAKF2noXtqUyGcvsJHB1q7v0L2vjy6_kHKa0Wh-f61fnhJd-y9_oqtbXi-8JWGtyGvKN3JhlMBUKuUrZKniTbdCB4M2oMGs0VN6r7aJbkME7Bt0ZhrH3gwGhuZwP3Ccpr6fAdCANWEexmkLNjxgfkDnoSH3sRkAY0w3gG2tmfq5sxAB-jjHoGyHkWrm9k-mqx64pXd-Ibchn01yR61FVP9TwaJgue-7LQ9pM-8f2h-HguX0UpELYUAFixQM5NOGvj4ZRcESOIvcmaMuz-_vhLoyvchreXJhErp2vflQRfsr6oOkZn4rWBp2sdyUEsk4Kdvtp6f0r6r-18qXg78BAAD__-AEiiw). The holiday fruitcake has been on the receiving end of countless jokes, not always being well-received during annual gifting rounds. But the dense confection lives on, as profiled in today's ["Whatever Happened To..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM1u1DAUhZ_G2WVkXzsJWWTRKRiE1M6Glp9NZOybyS2eeLBvJ4SnR-EVujtHOjr69H19GB8cRVrOj-6CA09pXHAtEZkxjzGtmK8Zi890ZUqLT4WLU3IECU2toAY1BkdxG00VhgkRUFc4qK5ttWoUNNU8BJzMu86jdFo3vpM-hMaHBtrW67ZDU9GwvykApZRswByM6nQvDQQAHfrghZEYiFM-vCRaeMYpbumG-eDTpYrDzHwtQt8JsAKsTzHSUjgj8j4QYH_GdC4CbOGUCffEM9Yz7X2r01RP-ZXYu18otC25RKYg9Pu76XI8pfTn8WTt66dsZvv87di_2O756b58SM2P4-92PH1_6j-vH9f53sUv29Zb-bfKQ7iuFCOVthNGni-O4n9WfpPg2wD_AgAA__8JFZBi) As you wrap up your holiday shopping, today's sponsor, [Brad’s Deals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGu2yAQRb8G7xzBgO1kwaJS5N3rtks0gbEzFQY_IM_K31duK_UDup25Orr3_PhwH8iR0_odN7JtyS7RUSO1RsXFfFDZC1VfeG-ck8-1VVTSgYShV9CDcgE5vp3pgl2IgHRHVk3jqNWgYOiedoKHuU630UvEZSJDD-PhShqGq_SEumN70hSAUkoOYC5GTfomDQQAHW7BCyMpcMvl8jNzak9a4jt_Ubn4vHXRPlvbq9DfBMwC5uM4Lo-CoQbCWM-IgBn9p4A5YgqcVqHnV9tcza_iSej7P2AfGgoYz-9GgV-b0PfAdY_4_nv2uO3IaxL6vlKigrFH__nHRH_OEDB6x0Hou5I3GLpiw35wjFzHSRi5bsjxd-_2X7K_LPwKAAD__8L2kks), makes it easy to stretch your budget further with a free, personalized newsletter featuring last-chance sales and handpicked deals from the brands you already love.
|
---
## ****Drug Makers to Reduce Prescription Costs
The Trump administration announced new agreements on Friday with some of the world's largest drug manufacturers aimed at [lowering prescription drug costs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSozAQBNCvgUwUGsCYQMElZL70QkpIAx6fhKgZYdZ_v2VHm2_e1dX9_t2mm6VA2_rXRjR5SdOGpwTMGXkK6UTeGcUx7ZnS5pJksbqeoIZOaVCgJ28pvKa29GZBBGxKNLq_XBrdaejKu_FusLZ3vZ69nd0CQ4Nt113r5jp3w7VfSjLvNg2gta47aKtW981Qt-ABGj94V7Q1esqJq0eiLd9xCa_0RK5cimUw95x3KZo_BYwFjOd5Vkv6mg-hDUXemQLGPQXK5KSAMfMRdyXoDkZRdmXEiFsWFe0jsfJ8rNH-Rxb1ua8ienKWvPoJoT4SykZkcnaTko3fTwqB5NIXbb1GS-GzL_8K9WngOwAA__-HzpBq) for Americans. Nine pharmaceutical companies have agreed to [reduce prices on their flagship drugs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGuozAQQE8DnZE9NpAULrahy7ZbIscewuwaG9mToNx-Rb70L_C70TxpNO_9uc03R5HS47fb0PKS54RHjciMZY75wLIXrL7QzpSTz5WrU3IGCb1QIEDNwVF8z6YNdkEE1C1aNQ6DVr2Cvl2tGRA8jBCWYDA4jRKH-3DRZgTQy7C0ZM9rCkApJXswnVGjvkoDAUCHa_CNkRiIc-n-Zkq84hLf-YWl83lro12Z99roXw1MDUzHcXTp7k-Lkzcwregir9-DOFEDU6KEIpTnY3P_sFThnywCuii4PLdduLBRosrFneKiRldXsWEg_7X4pBDFJwe9VPrSFhv2g2KkOoyNkY_NUfx8yD_K-rLwPwAA__8YK46I) for Medicaid recipients and people who buy the medications in cash, rather than through insurance, as part of a new deal. In addition, any newly launched drugs made by the companies will also be charged at the ["most-favored-nation" pricing](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L0OnDAQBOCnMZ0RXvNzFC6Sgu7SpEiJFnuBjYyNbHPo3j66e4XUI43mmz_P-YnsOWy_8CBT1jgHurOnUijNPt6UzkTZJj4Lx2BjLhlVM0MDnVQgQc0O2b_ntnJmJQLSFRk19L1WnYKu2o0mPaDrV1wsNe0IKywKFlxQ2QEULRWbT5sCUEo1HbR1qwY9Ni04AO1GZ0XbkOMSU_03cig7rf4dX5RqG4_Km72UMwv9Q8AkYMLFfgT1Fj-xgOnnlTlQzgKmmxP9LjG9BUwlXccpMYR4BUtZfq3SpWuTZ2JL0hH6LEd57pgOtHQVtuilgkfXP7qHrpJx583ec-4H0Tbbgey_k8p__fgy8C8AAP___12IZg) across the country for everyone, including commercial and cash pay markets, as well as Medicare and Medicaid. A senior administration official said about [30 to 40 percent of Medicaid drugs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFy6yAQheGngU4edgWSXVDcRp1vm1KDYGXIIMGgjT16-4yTR0h9znzF_3Gf7y7ltD_-u40sr2Xe6XVkYqY25_KiVhsdvqXKqey-HHw4UDMqNB1ghzAHl_I5axnsSoTUS7IwDkMPBtDIaBcAZxYH0F8VKRrWVWljjEa1XL32i0z2rQEiACiD-qJh7G9KY0Dswy14oRWFxKVdPkvaOdKaz_KkdvFlk9lG5nqI_p_ASeDEkWLK-b0JnGrJyZ8Cp0guc_SukcDJDGZUN9Nx-9pq9_vpanRtc517NKKNdhY4yWZDfaWc0zGMQqvH5tKPLPlPqZ4WvwMAAP__luZ8eg) would be impacted.
## U.S. Makes Retaliatory Strikes on Syria
The [Trump administration launched military strikes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOiLPYAMuXGyTLttuibz2OMzKYGTPJsrfP_F-4ZVXV7q65_x5rA_PmY_nb7-Tk1TWg94tkwjVNZc31bNSC5VP4XKE0qR5UCsqNAPggLBGz_mz6j66RIQ09uRgnqYRDKDpNxdM1MuibVJ_I5KyKZC1flwohZRAzT27aw0QAUAZ1DcN82iVxog4RhtDpxVFllJv_wofslHKn_Kiegtl77PbRM7Wjb86vHd49-cFcFVXqMIhU4f39qnsB27Z7xyGJl5o2OjZSLZB6v_9HCaIgUhZM0-BFjVFGr3S3lMAg9qavrp4vjlnbtPcafXcPefvC_Ijby-HXwEAAP__qBqA4Q) in Syria on Friday, targeting Islamic State fighters and weapons sites after an ambush killed two U.S. troops and an American civilian interpreter a week ago. U.S. Central Command said it used "[more than 100 precision munitions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdEZ4bcKfwsXf0OXaK5Gxl2QvBiPvXlDe_sS9wnUjjTSa7_u8TbdAmbb7R1jRy1KmDQ_OKIJ1yuXAulfkWGkXKlssLBxMN0EHvTagwUwpUH5Prkl-QQS0DXozXC7W9Ab65uHN8m_BEGcz2NkGN_TmCrHvw-xgdrOLDflzzQAYY7oeXOvMYK-dgwRg0zVF5TpMJKW2X4U2eeCS3-WFtY1lbbJ_iOys7H8Fo4LxOI42znxSnL2C8YwKxm_NmqXSE1kTE2sJ9Y7CmjbN70pBh0WwaqvDipVi2Fg_KWdMOgcWfSA-FYxN9Wk_KGfiy6Bcd18D5d8n8id9Lw8_AQAA___rgIVp) targeting known ISIS infrastructure and weapons sites.” More than 70 targets were struck using F-15 fighter jets, A-10 Thunderbolts, and Apache attack helicopters. [Secretary of War Pete Hegseth said](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL9G6miQK1KOCxZp3F3alMJaXNqb0KKxu3eC_j5wfuHKGQwGD-_3x_KB3Hi7_8InZat92WjXRmYkS-s7yUtIV-GXcd_WrqYY_AIekgvgICwFuR1LHEuuREDTSDmc53kKKUAaHzldKP2ICQPVGxQfq09YcS63EHAOtzpyfr8FgBCCTxBPMZyni49QAKZyKesQPRW2Lqc_nTd7UG1H_yI5rf05tvwwe-kw_RzgOsB13_eTmiCbGj9J36N33aWVAa6fGxsVp4ZG-s7qVhRhUtc_zTWUOzldsZETMmyM1uVwasJ_SR3ekTc1x8rqeHN6CKPrtfLK2NQpHqPk8tq5Ndb5PER_fyK3_6j2Lb9fGf4FAAD__1h-k6c), _“This is not the beginning of a war – it is a declaration of vengeance. Today, we hunted and we killed our enemies. Lots of them. And we will continue.”_
## **List: Cheapest Places to Fly From Each State**
Finding an affordable airfare can be difficult these days, but [good deals are out there](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u9CAQAJ_G7rDYxT8fBcXXXHdpU1oYljMRNhZsbPnto8srpB_NSPP5nJ82pri_PuxGhkOed7pqImYqc8oXlaNQdSUeHPPucuVqQc4ocRCAAmH2NqZ77ltvAhGSasnANI4KBsChXQ2FRS-g9DJNXquw-GF0WkoP1tOgwLfRvG2ACABywL7rYVJa9ugRldfeNb0kHzmX7ivHnVcK6c4nlc7lrU1mZT5qo_43-GjwcV1Xx8WelOzuE8X6XegNNvhwK9mDKosjWUeCswjpFqHkTdBJ5RaVLZMA-DcqPaq2GH9cMaVYx6np5WuzMf02-U-jToM_AQAA___89n1S), according to Skyscanner. The [flight search engine analyzed data](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykjzFuAyEQAF8DnU_sHnB2QZHGndOmRBgWmwTDCZCRfx8leUL6mZHm42IvLuVUbu_uQWbEagvNnmkMajbXSW1v1H1L-0i1-NpHdyAsClQHwAOCDS7ll5U8mEiEtHIysGm9ggJU_G7ipkkdr9IpJULQMYI8BeG0BuGP-nrlyfzUABEAhEK5SNjWk5AYENdwCp5JQSGN2pbPmsq4U8yv-qS2-Prg2dzH2Dtb3xieGZ7nnEv_enXvSvlDGJ55M2GfKefU9cakuD1cyr_6-Nfz0-B3AAAA__97cWoa) from the largest airport in every U.S. state and identified the cheapest domestic and international destinations for March 2026. The majority of states offered some domestic flight options well below $100. Flexibility with dates, routes, or even nearby airports is a key to landing the best fares. Traveling off-peak seasons can also lead to significant savings.

([More](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8Gd7bYBSdxQXGNu1x7pUVgSfaEjQWbWHn7k-8V_m6kkWb0fX_uy91z5u3526_kJJVlo6NlEqG65HJQ3Su1UHkXLlsoTZoHvaDGsQfsEZboOX8X20WXiJBMRw6ul4uBEXDsXm6cDPgx6pAmE27phmAferTBeJtgMtSxO9cAEQD0iHawcDWTthgRTZxiUFZTZCl1-Ft4kxel_C0fqkMoa5fdS2RvyvxSOCucj-MYwqOdFGevcD6jwlkqfbhP5b2J562X8q7cpE9EfS0r9Sw-fxXOXXVxPzhnbpersvq5es7_r-RHfj4O_wUAAP__8_557g)) _Flying together with our sponsor_ **➤****A new report warns** that men living in [certain U.S. areas](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO2zAQAF9DdSdol6SkK1gcYKi7tCkFWruyNqBFglzY8e8D5wvXD2aA-f29fkdJct5-xTsH3fN68rMlVuW6pvzkWiq3rUpRyeeWm7YIw4oD-g_AD4SVoqTX6joKOzOy7TjANI4WPKDvjgDbPE3Oj-RnhsnHeXRAO20YHdjrHDsJbxsgAsDg0fUOJvs5OCRES5-0GTcwieba_8ly6sF7euUH137L9y6FQ7U0Y78MLgaXG2upuWkkOflNGFweQpz7chRjl7jvkiQqG3u55kSx8F8wOKqQsRc99tQaMSFceEP_1dVA5SkpSRsn44bbPUr6H9Yf3XoE_BcAAP__MD99jw) may be at higher risk of urinary blockages and enlarged prostate issues caused by toxic mineral buildup. **Whatever happened to Christmas fruitcake?** Fruitcake didn't start out as a punchline. It started out as a _solution_ : take ingredients that won't spoil--dried fruit, nuts, grains, honey, or sugar--and bind them into something [dense, calorie-rich, and travel-friendly](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM1u1DAUhZ_G2WVkXzsJWWTRKRiE1M6Glp9NZOybyS2eeLBvJ4SnR-EVujtHOjr69H19GB8cRVrOj-6CA09pXHAtEZkxjzGtmK8Zi890ZUqLT4WLU3IECU2toAY1BkdxG00VhgkRUFc4qK5ttWoUNNU8BJzMu86jdFo3vpM-hMaHBtrW67ZDU9GwvykApZRswByM6nQvDQQAHfrghZEYiFM-vCRaeMYpbumG-eDTpYrDzHwtQt8JsAKsTzHSUjgj8j4QYH_GdC4CbOGUCffEM9Yz7X2r01RP-ZXYu18otC25RKYg9Pu76XI8pfTn8WTt66dsZvv87di_2O756b58SM2P4-92PH1_6j-vH9f53sUv29Zb-bfKQ7iuFCOVthNGni-O4n9WfpPg2wD_AgAA__8JFZBi). Over time, the "cake" part turned more luxurious--and eventually got swept into winter feasting traditions. Then came fruitcake's secret superpower: it _ships_. It's sturdy. It keeps. It laughs at long journeys in a tin. When mail-order culture boomed in the United States--especially in the early 20th century--fruitcake became a perfect holiday gift. You could send "Christmas" across the country, and it would arrive intact, still festive, still edible. That's the era that cemented fruitcake as a mail-order classic. But the very thing that made fruitcake famous also helped sour its reputation. Mass production made it widely available, but not always widely _loved_. For many people, the fruitcake they met was overly sweet, oddly candied, and heavy enough to double as a doorstop. [Once comedy discovered it,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb_GbI7sh4EweOjClq4dkWU_h9cajOyX0Px9RX6h0x2OdHXu_brNN0eJtvunW9FyzPOGR03IjGVO-cCyF6y-0M6UN58rV6fVDAo6qUGCnoOj9JpNE2xEBGwbtHro-1Z3Grpmscroq4doxniFEH3sndJD145gvOvD2DZkzzYNoLVWHZiL0UM7KgMBoA1j8MIoDMS5XL4zbbxgTK_8xHLxeW2SXZj3KtoPAZOAKebfbjyJgOmccoY73V2SRy4pCJh4Qbm6-0aRPG4sF6qcy0vmKN-I6mMLWCrnHGQsD2LvflDA1BQb9oNSotoPwqj76ii9Nfhf3z0t_AUAAP__z_qELQ) the image calcified--memorably captured by Johnny Carson's line: _" There is only one fruitcake in the entire world, and people keep passing it around."_ And yet--plot twist!--fruitcake never actually died. Today it lives in a stubborn, seasonal niche: beloved by tradition-keepers, sustained by dedicated bakeries, monasteries, and mail-order loyalists who buy it on purpose. Even now, [Collin Street Bakery in Texas](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwzAMBOCnsbcEIiX_ZNDQJVu6dhQUiU5YMJYhEQny9oWLvkHXw-HD4b4u4RJZeL19xgd5XUpY6dWEVKkGKS-qW6WWKm_KZU2laYtgAhocDoAHhJAjyzu4PvuFCMn25GEaRwsD4NDf_TIizaNdpquZyc40wHQldPMUYx5nO_Tsdw0QAcAM6I4OJnsyDjOizaecOmcos5Z6_C686p0WeZcn1WMqj178XXVrnf3o8NzhORURXptWIt0LfxGlfX_r8BxF-urz9mIRbuPUOXN7RJZfTf91wdPjTwAAAP__wXpvgw) produces up to 20,000 cakes a day in the holiday rush. It's not mainstream-cool. It's not everyone's favorite. But every December, fruitcake returns like a holiday ghost with receipts: still here, still shipping, still daring you to take one bite and admit it might be . . . kind of good. _Have you ever given or received fruitcake as a gift? And did you eat it? Let us know by replying to this email._

Nine pharmaceutical companies have agreed to for Medicaid recipients and people who buy the medications in cash, rather than through insurance, as part of a new deal. In addition, any newly launched drugs made by the companies will also be charged at the across the country for everyone, including commercial and cash pay markets, as well as Medicare and Medicaid. A senior administration official said about would be impacted. Over 4,500 men have already been hospitalized with severe symptoms. National surveys reveal a clear geographic link— | Whatever happened to Christmas fruitcake? Fruitcake didn't start out as a punchline. It started out as a solution : take ingredients that won't spoil--dried fruit, nuts, grains, honey, or sugar--and bind them into something . Over time, the "cake" part turned more luxurious--and eventually got swept into winter feasting traditions. Then came fruitcake's secret superpower: it ships. It's sturdy. It keeps. It laughs at long journeys in a tin. When mail-order culture boomed in the United States--especially in the early 20th century--fruitcake became a perfect holiday gift. You could send "Christmas" across the country, and it would arrive intact, still festive, still edible. That's the era that cemented fruitcake as a mail-order classic. But the very thing that made fruitcake famous also helped sour its reputation. Mass production made it widely available, but not always widely loved. For many people, the fruitcake they met was overly sweet, oddly candied, and heavy enough to double as a doorstop. the image calcified--memorably captured by Johnny Carson's line: " There is only one fruitcake in the entire world, and people keep passing it around." And yet--plot twist!--fruitcake never actually died. Today it lives in a stubborn, seasonal niche: beloved by tradition-keepers, sustained by dedicated bakeries, monasteries, and mail-order loyalists who buy it on purpose. Even now, produces up to 20,000 cakes a day in the holiday rush. It's not mainstream-cool. It's not everyone's favorite. But every December, fruitcake returns like a holiday ghost with receipts: still here, still shipping, still daring you to take one bite and admit it might be . . . kind of good. Have you ever given or received fruitcake as a gift? And did you eat it? # Sunday, December 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1853, the Texas legislature passed the [Mississippi and Pacific Railroad Act](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyhCAUheGnwU4HrohaUKSx27QpHZCLMoOyAzfr-vYZ9xVS_dX5ivPzmB8mxHCs32ZHTW-f5gPPEpEI87yl30LpWNKOVLwNLq0ZKWScgUNXC6hBzM6EeM2yctpyN4oKteiVasUg1VBtuvcddqpFKzuzeOBiUNyNbrEG5NA6XwV9YwJACOCC983gxrYDb4U1_dAqwyRHFyjlhjYkfJvi45VemJsl7VXUG9GzsPaLwcRgOs-zobKZdMRwYJPyymD6rGpnrtpedxhMeFC-OypZZe2eZ4gxFNUzydfdhPjB6X-XvDT8BQAA__8yWnZD) to spur the construction of a southern transcontinental railroad through Texas. It wouldn't be until 1881 that a transcontinental route through Texas was completed. Today, we report on the [retirement of Gio](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNiP7QQwMHrqwpWtHZPye4UkmjmwHkr-v0vYPul9dnXO-rvPVcuDb-ml3MuXp43yjMwcqhdK8xUcu8ebiTiX7hTGuiQonmkHCRSgQoGa0HF5zV6NZJI6qJqN6rVs1dHqoN-NgQYujtDBqNbSoW4utvGgNyzB67Ws27zMFoBRIJftmwLG9gF_UYvuh1bbqJCGXmJqyUaGnzT684kGpcXGvg9lKueeq_ahgqmA6z7Px8Qn6D_49qmB6W1Uw-YWFS5w5C4yrOLcoXNx9TIVQPA4bkIS3OwemLH5ds7C-UBJIziKJTOlgR3UyeD85BM66rzq57pbDD1D5X8bDwHcAAAD__7fUiqE), the FBI's first crisis response canine, a black Labrador who comforted families after tragedies, including the Uvalde school shooting. Happy retirement, Gio, and thank you for your service! Today's sponsor, [Oricle Hearing Aids](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHr2zAQxT-NvP2N7-TI9qAhEAwd0i6FdhOydbIFshWkS5x8-5J069rtd_cej8f7dTVXG2LYl-92I81Pn8xOR4nETNms6V447XPaiIufgktLJg6ZDDZ4-gL8QjDOhvgybeX01LgBKtLQKSWhb1VfrdohQI-2b_0wT1aSmyeSHloFw4CKVBX0OwwQAbCBpqt7N8gT-gkm2_VSWdE25AKnXPNKTE9bfHylB-V6TlsV9cp8K0KeBY4Cx-M46oU45TBHejvebzka8oaz3YudOaTdBCfkRaBKHwAY_mHr_edCKQWqcp9AyMvP3-MPgeo8frv8laqs3e0IMYaiOtE2y2ZD_NTi_xvzofFPAAAA__8bYISN), is helping readers hear more clearly without the sky-high prices--offering a tiny, easy-to-use hearing aid with clear sound and all-day power for under $100.

## Houston Comets May Fly Again
Houston Rockets ownership is in advanced talks to purchase the Connecticut Sun and relocate the WNBA franchise to Texas, according to [reports published on Friday](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OozAUhZ_GdCDuxYBTuNiGLttuifxzCdYajOybkLz9KJl5g-mOdKSj833_rvPVhBj221-zkebnkuadzhKJmfK8pnvhtLu0EZfFBp9umThkmrHFvgasEWZvQnzNsvLatv4CFWkYh6EDJQdVrdoMUvUSFQE4Y5VVC0hpHHnbe-8BqqDfY4AIgC20Y6P8petxsWDNqLrBCNmSD5xywysxPU1Z4is9KDcubVXUK_NRRPdH4CRwOs-zcWtO-7sVOJUjZS4Cp5zcf_okkzm4SAKnH8D6m7DOxPe81xziZvZ6ocyB2dQI2GM3dM2xHlXW_jhDjKEMo5DtbTMhfo7w7_Q9NH4FAAD__1aBhqQ). The discussions have been characterized as positive, with Rockets owner Tilman Fertitta increasing his offer closer to what the Sun's leadership may accept. The team would be [rebranded as Houston Comets](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFy6yAQRb8GdWhgJSO5oHiNOr82pQbBYjFBoIG1Zf99xk7yBem2OHvn3PtxmS8mxJCu_82Gmh4-zwmPGpEIy7zmW6WcbN6Qql-Cy9eCFArOIODEJXCQszMhPue-cXoR7iwb1HJQqpNjr8Zm1csgRhw7hb1a0AwCUXjw3p2hE8NooAn6FSYBpAQhxdCO7tydwC9yMcPYKcN6gS5QLi2tSPgw1cdnvmNpbd6aqFeivbLuH4OJwXQcR_vrvZacgo34AhlMdc-FKoOpZPuJ78sUegEMpp8f_l2WeywUiAw_0mK4zSmhpWBvxOstcZBwgk6odl_3pmi3HyHGUNXAenHdTIhvNfrboHcNXwEAAP__WZeNpA), reviving the franchise that won the WNBA's first four championships from 1997 to 2000 before folding in 2008. WNBA Commissioner Cathy Engelbert indicated Houston was "up next" for a franchise after the league announced expansion teams for Cleveland, Detroit, and Philadelphia earlier this year. The parties have not yet [signed an exclusivity](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MHOnCAQB_CnwRtGUFEPHLZpTC_bS5P2aBAGJUUwMK67b9-4_b4n-E4zyfzzz-T35z7dlfMuLD_VBhKfNk4BzuwBEdK0xiNjDDpugNnOzsQlAboEE694SxmnnE1GOf-amsLIuTIDK0CyToia9Y3oi1XqXlkF2oqWdcNg59lq0VoheMdqwYa2cPIqY5wzxitWdWVvhrrldmaz6vpaKNJUYBzGVOIKCE-VrX_FB6RSx63wckXcM6lvhI-Ej-d5llsO143wEQI9MuFj3mPCa4m4QiJ8VAkorkB1DAE0On0gzUegCXzUCl1YqAqGfsY-JOh_imtciVnpv-8ueruxXz_CgKQeo3aG1N-_Xahw5t-Q9iJJs5_Oe5dFR5pq2ZTz7-_xa-YPyf8FAAD__7utmSY) agreement, and no final decision has been made on the franchise's future.
## Panhandle Cities Demand Xcel Accountability
Eleven Texas Panhandle cities announced on Wednesday that they have formed the "[Lonestar Eleven Coalition" to demand accountability](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdI48AwGncLEN3d12S2TsAUYydmTmXpK3X5FXuM2pjr7z8-9r-vKcOK9__U5OXkuZMp1HIhGq01a-Dyk5lJ3kWGaOZa0kXGlCg3cNqBGm6Dm9p66JbjbxAQ05GPq-Bdv1ttlctGhssH0Eus8d3cHYoQXAYX5480Bo2F0wQARAA2a42fho77jMMPvBtr1XnaHIUupNNhJ6-WNJ7_JD9RbK3iS3iTwP1f5ROCocz_O8XRPC5nOmBOZyKRyvEIUj4CVW4fgh6afPm88xkQ4sTIdeSt11KD6xcMk60u5z5LzqV6CkKVNd39qHUL6z-JkTy1v7Rajqk1NcuJLCsakuPk9OiY9-UJ1Zd8_pU1d-d_KPw_8BAAD__9TfknY) from Xcel Energy following last year's Smokehouse Creek Fire. The coalition includes Amarillo, Canadian, Fritch, and other municipalities affected by the largest wildfire in state history. Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a [lawsuit Tuesday seeking](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMuumzAQQL_G7Bz5hU0WXqSqWFRKF63ULpHBA1jX4MgeQvL3la_6B3d7ZnRGc_7eh7sLMezLT7eBxdechh3OEgER8rCmo2Dap7QBlnkMPi0ZMGQYBBMt5YIKPngX4ntQjbcj81fegOVGa8k7pbtmta1nXJmrNqpV0mjTThK47FrvlNSOyybYKuNCcC4YZ-bS-atsxTzy0ZlOakcUAx8w5QuugPByZY7v9IR8mdLWRLsiPgqRNyJ6IvrzPC9b2euMiB52epRKweEKuZIXZtiA_icUnrBjXfk0U7fQckChB4YY8E3rHSqYULRs6QNoTQJ0ygAf9AzRzyEDEb3L9Hbjv_HXjzuRfZqCJ_L7t9oVzvIH8qPJ1j_OEGMo2hDFls2F-PkAfi3704p_AQAA__9jn5he) economic damages and civil penalties against the Minnesota-based utility company. A Texas House committee report identified decayed utility poles as the fire's source. The fire burned more than a million acres, killed three people and over 15,000 head of cattle, and caused economic losses exceeding $1 billion.
## FBI Canine Retires After Decade
The FBI announced on Thursday that Gio, its first crisis response canine who [comforted families after](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNiP7QQwMHrqwpWtHZPye4UkmjmwHkr-v0vYPul9dnXO-rvPVcuDb-ml3MuXp43yjMwcqhdK8xUcu8ebiTiX7hTGuiQonmkHCRSgQoGa0HF5zV6NZJI6qJqN6rVs1dHqoN-NgQYujtDBqNbSoW4utvGgNyzB67Ws27zMFoBRIJftmwLG9gF_UYvuh1bbqJCGXmJqyUaGnzT684kGpcXGvg9lKueeq_ahgqmA6z7Px8Qn6D_49qmB6W1Uw-YWFS5w5C4yrOLcoXNx9TIVQPA4bkIS3OwemLH5ds7C-UBJIziKJTOlgR3UyeD85BM66rzq57pbDD1D5X8bDwHcAAAD__7fUiqE) the Uvalde school shooting, will retire after 10 years of service. The [12-year-old English Labrador](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb8GMy26dcAJCF5iNi_d0AJptKtQpoAdZ_5-y_2FzW50T53z9ZgfliMf63-7k6nvkOaDzhKpVsrzlr5LTceSdqolOPZpzVQ504wSby1gizB7y_EzD403Tvo7NGRAK9XDOKix2YwDqdWA4z14r60jUKDdrffBe4nDCA2b6wwQAVCC1N3o7_0NgwNn9dgrKwZJnmvKXd2o0tuWED_pRblb0t5Es9X6LKL_J3ASOJ3n2QXH3ZpeAqdLRuBUaspM11oyFy5tpmc6CrWLPfigduXUZOOfJ8fIRWkxyHW3HH8J9W9dXgZ_AgAA__9sAniK) was deployed to over 140 assignments nationwide, including high-profile incidents like the Pulse Nightclub shooting and the 2022 Uvalde elementary school shooting that killed 19 children and two teachers. Gio and his partner Wally supported more than 4,100 victims and their families. Gio became the first facility dog to assist a victim during witness testimony in a federal courtroom. The FBI has expanded the program, recently deploying new canines, such as Peg, to the Dallas Field Office for a faster regional response across North Texas. clean_body: Houston Rockets ownership is in advanced talks to purchase the Connecticut Sun and relocate the WNBA franchise to Texas, according to . | | | | | | Sunday, December 21, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1853, the Texas legislature passed the to spur the construction of a southern transcontinental railroad through Texas. It wouldn't be until 1881 that a transcontinental route through Texas was completed. Today, we report on the , the FBI's first crisis response canine, a black Labrador who comforted families after tragedies, including the Uvalde school shooting. Happy retirement, Gio, and thank you for your service! Today's sponsor, , is helping readers hear more clearly without the sky-high prices--offering a tiny, easy-to-use hearing aid with clear sound and all-day power for under $100. Abilene ☀️ 58/34° | Amarillo ⛅ 52/30° | Austin ☀️ 64/45° | Brownsville ☀️ 72/56° | Corpus Christi ☀️ 68/52° | DFW ☀️ 60/40° | El Paso ☀️ 56/36° | Houston ☀️ 65/48° | Laredo ☀️ 70/50° | Lubbock ⛅ 54/32° | Midland ☀️ 58/34° | San Antonio ☀️ 66/46° | Tyler ⛅ 62/44° | Waco ☀️ 63/42° Take The Flyover with you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Houston Comets May Fly Again Houston Rockets ownership is in advanced talks to purchase the Connecticut Sun and relocate the WNBA franchise to Texas, according to . The discussions have been characterized as positive, with Rockets owner Tilman Fertitta increasing his offer closer to what the Sun's leadership may accept. The team would be , reviving the franchise that won the WNBA's first four championships from 1997 to 2000 before folding in 2008. WNBA Commissioner Cathy Engelbert indicated Houston was "up next" for a franchise after the league announced expansion teams for Cleveland, Detroit, and Philadelphia earlier this year. The parties have not yet agreement, and no final decision has been made on the franchise's future. Panhandle Cities Demand Xcel Accountability Eleven Texas Panhandle cities announced on Wednesday that they have formed the " from Xcel Energy following last year's Smokehouse Creek Fire. The coalition includes Amarillo, Canadian, Fritch, and other municipalities affected by the largest wildfire in state history. Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a economic damages and civil penalties against the Minnesota-based utility company. A Texas House committee report identified decayed utility poles as the fire's source. The fire burned more than a million acres, killed three people and over 15,000 head of cattle, and caused economic losses exceeding $1 billion. FBI Canine Retires After Decade The FBI announced on Thursday that Gio, its first crisis response canine who the Uvalde school shooting, will retire after 10 years of service. The was deployed to over 140 assignments nationwide, including high-profile incidents like the Pulse Nightclub shooting and the 2022 Uvalde elementary school shooting that killed 19 children and two teachers. Gio and his partner Wally supported more than 4,100 victims and their families. Gio became the first facility dog to assist a victim during witness testimony in a federal courtroom. The FBI has expanded the program, recently deploying new canines, such as Peg, to the Dallas Field Office for a faster regional response across North Texas. . | Flying together with our sponsor This Tiny Hearing Aid Is Changing Lives— Big companies charge THOUSANDS for hearing aids—but guess what? () ➤ Woodway: Residents will pay an additional $83 a year starting next spring as waste trucks travel farther to a new Axtell facility, officials announced. () ➤ Temple: Baylor Scott and White McLane Children's Medical Center hosted the seventh annual Lorenzo Toy Drive, collecting new, unwrapped toys to support young patients and families during the holiday season. () ➤ Potter County: Officials approved plans for a large housing development south of Loop 335 that will add about 1,150 affordable homes and boost the tax base. The project is expected to break ground in January. () ➤ Killeen: The City Council is considering shifting elections from May to November in odd-numbered years, a move allowed under new state law and aimed at boosting voter turnout. () ➤ Pampa: Authorities engaged in a playful social media chase after reports of the Grinch's arrest, escape, and continued holiday mischief circulated across the Texas Panhandle.
