As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...

| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Senators Ted Cruz And John Fetterman Agree On Hating One 'Evil' During Bipartisan Interview:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, and Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pa., agreed on the condemnation of antisemitism in a rare moment of shared ideology and praise during an interview Tuesday on "Hannity." "I just want to commend John Fetterman for the courage he's served... he's shown extraordinary courage calling out antisemitism in his own party. And he's done so at considerable cost to himself," Sen. Cruz told host Sean Hannity. The senators' bipartisan discussion comes in the aftermath of the Dec. 14 Bondi Beach mass shooting that claimed 15 lives..." **[Senate Passes Cruz Bill To Change NDAA Provision Tied To National Airport Crash:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "The Senate on Wednesday passed a bill by Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) aimed at boosting military helicopter safety, particularly around Reagan Washington National Airport, after a battle in recent days to have it included in the National Defense Authorization Act. Cruz sought and received unanimous consent for the Rotorcraft Operations Transparency and Oversight Reform Act, which he and colleagues attempted to include in the annual Defense policy bill that passed earlier in the day. He said he hopes the bill passes the House in short order and is signed into..." **[Cruz Threatens To Disarm FCC Over Jimmy Kimmel's Suspension:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Ted Cruz had a clear message for President Donald Trump's top TV regulator: Cool it. Three months ago, the Texas Republican had thrown himself into an intraparty fight defending Jimmy Kimmel's right to free speech after Federal Communications Commission Chair Brendan Carr pressured broadcasters to pull the comedian's late-night show for comments he made after the assassination of Charlie Kirk. Now, given the opportunity to prod Carr on Capitol Hill, Cruz scolded him in person. "Democrat or Republican, we cannot have the government arbitrating truth or..." **[CRUZ: Texas Lawmakers Propose GUARD Act to Boost Defense AI Capabilities:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Sens. John Cornyn, R-Texas, and Ted Cruz, R-Texas, have introduced a bill that aims to strengthen artificial intelligence research and development and create an AI-ready workforce. Called the Growing University AI for Defense, or GUARD, Act, tasks the Department of War to establish and oversee a National Security and Defense AI Institute, Cornyn's office said Friday. Rep. body:

Hey Peter,
I just had my morning coffee while going over our fundraising numbers for the month so far. As finance director, it’s my job to make sure our campaign has the resources needed to elect Katie as California’s next governor.
In a state this big, running a truly competitive campaign costs a lot—we’re talking millions of dollars to reach voters across California.
As of this morning, we’re tracking slightly behind on our December fundraising projections—**[can you chip in right now to help us catch up?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251221_1_ak.K3A2n9&refcode=em20251221-40590&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40590%2E3422442%2EBXVxll)**
Thank you,
Thomas
Finance Director

Special elections throughout 2025 have seen unprecedented victories for Democratic candidates in deep red districts. Republican senators are dropping like flies, retiring over being dealt embarrassing defeats. And Trump is pushing Red states to invent new maps in a vain attempt to help Republicans hold the house.

| Every Georgia Democrat should be cheering: Eric Gisler -- a Democrat who runs a local olive oil shop -- won a special election and flipped a Georgia state House seat that Donald Trump carried by 12 points.
Republicans want you to believe districts like Marjorie Taylor Greene's aren't winnable. They tell us her district is too red, too far gone, too hopeless to contest.
But they said the same thing about districts just like the one Eric Gisler now represents.
[Will you rush a donation to my campaign right now to help me build on this momentum and win MTG's district for Democrats?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YNP2eV-Lkt5a3UtcC5xKuwbacb2qoSqqOkZPjaTTvdwaZ9enet05FU3JZX3lkGcSjuZke2Z7t8L5c-bh0FF4YdIXIYH7zBpKjwB05BgBLN-Z0gFk4u6YhPseJTBbGEKrhMjQ90Lnw4HvT8Axqiy0TSLCkbxfSbrPdAMJHsANBFWMNTA10wT5wDl_db0QLlu7HIUbHgdQdDDvwxZExSbKXKb_42dXT9ng&c=YBXqZ4APPRXFLWZAJyf8SbpUDM8rtU9sYHGWD8zCjK5rjAmAy22c7Q==&ch=vh_9Yr06xBW-owavozz6eOUnfdwkO8ubNIzzFR0xDcAs566CS_mzyA==)
---
| Here's what this win tells us:

* Voters in so-called "deep red" areas are tired of being taken for granted.
* When Democrats actually show up and give people something to vote for, they respond.
* The map is changing -- and our imagination needs to change with it.

I'm in this race because I believe Georgia deserves more than chaos, conspiracy theories, and cruelty. We deserve representatives who care about lowering costs, protecting our freedoms, and actually solving problems -- not chasing cable news hits.
This election result isn't just a feel-good headline. It's a blueprint.
We can organize in places Republicans have written off. We can build real coalitions in communities MTG has ignored. And yes -- we can flip her seat.
[But that only happens if we invest early and build strong. So if you're as energized by this news as I am, I'm asking you to step up: Please rush a donation of any amount to my campaign right now.](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YNP2eV-Lkt5a3UtcC5xKuwbacb2qoSqqOkZPjaTTvdwaZ9enet05FU3JZX3lkGcSjuZke2Z7t8L5c-bh0FF4YdIXIYH7zBpKjwB05BgBLN-Z0gFk4u6YhPseJTBbGEKrhMjQ90Lnw4HvT8Axqiy0TSLCkbxfSbrPdAMJHsANBFWMNTA10wT5wDl_db0QLlu7HIUbHgdQdDBumTlpRdjMiNvdrjBi5k3g&c=YBXqZ4APPRXFLWZAJyf8SbpUDM8rtU9sYHGWD8zCjK5rjAmAy22c7Q==&ch=vh_9Yr06xBW-owavozz6eOUnfdwkO8ubNIzzFR0xDcAs566CS_mzyA==)

clean_body: If there was ever a time to beat Boebert it is now but the attacks against Trisha are already underway and we need to keep up. | | | | | == | Peter, This summer, Democrat Trisha Calvarese announced her rematch against Lauren Boebert. In the 2024 election, a red wave year that saw democrats underperform across the board, Trisha did the opposite. She brought Colorado's 4th Congressional district the closest it has ever gone to flipping blue since 2008, the last time a Democrat held this seat. Special elections throughout 2025 have seen unprecedented victories for Democratic candidates in deep red districts. Republican senators are dropping like flies, retiring over being dealt embarrassing defeats. And Trump is pushing Red states to invent new maps in a vain attempt to help Republicans hold the house. If there was ever a time to beat Boebert it is now but the attacks against Trisha are already underway and we need to keep up. Trisha is facing a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, we are getting close to our goal but we aren't there yet. If Trisha is going to win and defeat Lauren Boebert in 2026, she is counting on you to give today: == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Trisha is beyond grateful to have your support. Thank you. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Congress can and must reject “Trump-Kennedy Center” rename!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Congress Reject “Trump-Kennedy Center” Rename](https://default.salsalabs.org/T073fc3cf-2fe1-469f-b67f-13f2952de5bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **_([Click here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a1e90aa-490a-4d28-8d66-10c85ffcbc21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to go straight to the petition. Already signed? Share it!)_** _**(UPDATE: They've added Trump's name to the building sign! Don't let them get away with this!)**_ The Kennedy Center is a national cultural treasure — a place meant to celebrate art, creativity, and freedom of expression. **But Donald Trump — a national cultural embarrassment — is trying to force through a name change to “Trump-Kennedy Center” **([story](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9afdb72-0977-414f-9d25-1b3c29974a19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) **[Don’t let this happen. Congress has the power to reject this. Sign the petition, and demand they use that power and stop this move ASAP.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3698b8c-ba4d-4d3d-be4d-5773774cc66a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Donald Trump isn’t just a horrible president, he may well be the single worst enemy of the arts and free expression in America. He has repeatedly attacked and bullied artists, journalists, and cultural institutions, and rallied his supporters to do the same. **Renaming one of America’s most respected cultural institutions after him would be an insult to the artists, audiences, and history the Kennedy Center represents.** This is not about honoring culture. It’s about rewriting history and turning a shared national institution into a monument to one man’s supersized ego. Trump’s hand-picked (and utterly unqualified) newly installed Kennedy Center board just approved the change. But they don’t have the power to do this — Congress does. And they must reject it immediately, before Trump starts ripping apart the place, so he can install a wing dedicated to fart jokes. **[Sign the petition, and demand Congress reject this NOW:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03b5b7c1-817c-4255-b840-ccb71bbcf2f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **“We demand Congress immediately reject and reverse any effort to rename the Kennedy Center after Donald Trump.”**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5fb001ba-51e4-428e-bb21-dd7062235174/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc351962d-ac5c-4822-9eab-cb440879c5f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0f432d0-41a9-49e4-80d3-87c0f485e809/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta52adfbe-728d-43f2-b797-66a7f6b2ad14/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

Washington, District of Columbia

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: New Year’s Resolution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2390%2E135344%2EMFiwmL)

Hello everyone,
Over my first year in office, I've heard from so many of you who want to know how we move forward in this political climate, especially when there are three more years of the current administration. A few thoughts as you work on your New Year’s resolutions.
**First, don’t tune out**. I know it's hard, but that is what Trump would love. America needs you now more than ever. If previous generations had not fought for democracy, where would we be today?
**Second, hold your elected officials, including me, accountable**. Watch how they’re voting. It's going to be an election year so they're more likely to be active in your community. Go to town halls and demand they take action. That’s as American as apple pie.
**Third, organize**. Pick just one issue you’re passionate about — and go deep. (And doom scrolling doesn’t count.) Join a group that cares about your issue, and act. And if you can’t find one, start one.Some of the most important movements in our history have come from the bottom up.
We all know that our country is going through something right now. We’re not sure what the next day is going to hold, let alone the next decade.
But this isn’t the first time we’ve experienced significant and tumultuous change as a country. I’m a student of history, and we’ve gone through periods of political instability before. And ultimately, we’ve chosen to keep changing this country for the better.
But every single time, we’ve only gotten through those moments because of two things: Engaged citizens and principled leaders.
Engaged citizens who do a little bit more than they’re used to doing to fight for the things they care about. And principled leaders who are ready to receive the ball and do something about it.
[**Can you make a small contribution - $5, $50 or whatever you can afford - to help me elect a new generation of leaders in the next election? Ones who will put country first?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct25.P8-T7T&refcode=em251220&t=2&akid=2390%2E135344%2EMFiwmL)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $24](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-oct25.VEj3Gn&amount=24&refcode=em251220&t=21&akid=2390%2E135344%2EMFiwmL)**
---
****
| **[Donate $35](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2881?c0=ebs-em-oct25.CjaKFi&refcode=em251220&t=22&akid=2390%2E135344%2EMFiwmL)**

Thank you for your continued support over my first year in office
Elissa Slotkin

East Lansing, MI 48826

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: There is no limit...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

Peter, it’s Adam Schiff.
We all know how important it is to flip control of the Senate next year. And it starts by holding onto Democratic-held seats, _including my friend Jon Ossoff’s race in Georgia._
Right now, Jon is facing the full force of MAGA attacks and needs our help to protect his critical Senate seat. I will explain more in a moment, [**but if you are in a rush and are already ready to do what it takes to protect this seat, you can give $5 here.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251221-1-f&t=1&akid=1308%2E5691347%2E0ymt6x)
There is _no limit_ to what Donald Trump is willing to do to go after his perceived rivals. _He’s even called for me to be held accountable for treason._
**Jon and I know just how dangerous this behavior is.**
Before he ran for office, Jon exposed corruption around the world as an investigative journalist. And before I got to the Senate, I led Trump’s first impeachment and served on the January 6 Committee in the House.
We both continue this work every day, fighting to hold Trump and his administration to account. Jon and I are continuing the struggle to reclaim our democracy and stop the rampant corruption going on.
There’s a reason corrupt billionaires and GOP Super PACs are doing everything they can to take back Jon’s seat and replace him with a MAGA lackey who will rubber stamp Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. **Because they know Jon will continue to stand up to Trump — and they want to silence him.**
Here’s the good news: **Jon knows how to win.**
In 2021, Georgia defied the odds and built a record-breaking grassroots movement — thanks to people like you stepping up.
_Peter, I know we can do it again._
By working together, we can protect this seat and make sure Jon is able to keep fighting against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda.
[**So, will you join me in supporting Jon Ossoff by making a donation to his reelection campaign today? Winning the midterms will be essential to stopping Donald Trump, and we can’t do it without you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251221-1-f&t=2&akid=1308%2E5691347%2E0ymt6x)

clean_body: Peter, it’s Adam Schiff. We all know how important it is to flip control of the Senate next year. And it starts by holding onto Democratic-held seats, including my friend Jon Ossoff’s race in Georgia. Right now, Jon is facing the full force of MAGA attacks and needs our help to protect his critical Senate seat. I will explain more in a moment, There is no limit to what Donald Trump is willing to do to go after his perceived rivals. He’s even called for me to be held accountable for treason. Jon and I know just how dangerous this behavior is. Before he ran for office, Jon exposed corruption around the world as an investigative journalist. And before I got to the Senate, I led Trump’s first impeachment and served on the January 6 Committee in the House. We both continue this work every day, fighting to hold Trump and his administration to account. Jon and I are continuing the struggle to reclaim our democracy and stop the rampant corruption going on. There’s a reason corrupt billionaires and GOP Super PACs are doing everything they can to take back Jon’s seat and replace him with a MAGA lackey who will rubber stamp Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. Because they know Jon will continue to stand up to Trump — and they want to silence him. Here’s the good news: Jon knows how to win. In 2021, Georgia defied the odds and built a record-breaking grassroots movement — thanks to people like you stepping up. Peter, I know we can do it again. By working together, we can protect this seat and make sure Jon is able to keep fighting against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. name: Ro Khanna
subject: This race came down to 4,000 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Dear Peter,
PA-07 was decided by just 4,000 votes in 2024. That made it one of the closest congressional races in the country and one of our best opportunities to flip a seat and take back the House in 2026.
That’s why I’m all-in for Bob Brooks.
Bob is a 20-year firefighter, a union leader, and a lifelong member of his community. He’s spent his life protecting working families, and he’ll fight just as hard in Congress to protect Medicaid, SNAP, and good-paying jobs in the Lehigh Valley.
But races this close come down to resources.
Will you rush to split a contribution between Bob Brooks and my campaign today, before the end-of-the-year deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bob-brooks-fundraising-split?refcode=20251221]
Republicans like Ryan Mackenzie are voting to slash benefits for working families while protecting tax breaks for the wealthy. Bob Brooks will stand up to corruption and fight for an economy that works for everyone.
Every dollar matters. Every deadline matters.
Please chip in before the end of the year to help flip PA-07 and take back the House.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bob-brooks-fundraising-split?refcode=20251221]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro

Please chip in before the end of the year to help flip PA-07 and take back the House. DONATE [] Thank you for your activism and all that you do. body:
#
$5. That’s our ask today to help us take back Texas and send James Talarico to the U.S. Senate.
We’ll share more in a moment, but if you already understand the stakes and are ready to give before our FEC deadline, please contribute at this link:
**[https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/FEC-Deadline](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251221-1-ak&t=1&akid=333%2E1347274%2EobWB_A)**
Here’s the situation, Peter:
Super PACs are already spending at least ten million dollars in this race. There’s no limit to how much they can and will spend to hold this seat through next November.
It’s outrageous. None of that spending should be legal. James has promised to lead the fight in the U.S. Senate to ban super PACs, cap campaign contributions nationwide, and get Big Money out of our politics.
But those at the top who benefit from the status quo are going to target James and keep the system broken.
Our opponents are going to put millions of dollars behind their lies and baseless attacks to tear down James. He is going to get absolutely pummeled by attack ads.
We have to go on offense now to make sure Texans hear from James first.
[**Please use this link to contribute $5 or any amount you can to make sure we’re ready for whatever comes our way. All eyes are on our campaign ahead of our FEC deadline, and we can’t slow down now.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251221-1-ak&t=2&akid=333%2E1347274%2EobWB_A)

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m still sorry about Karoline Leavitt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We already rejected MAGA talking points in New Hampshire. Now national Republicans are dusting off their playbook.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)
**I’m sorry about Karoline Leavitt.**
A few years ago, Karoline Leavitt ran against me for Congress here in New Hampshire. Her campaign was steeped in extreme MAGA rhetoric and zero connection to the actual issues Granite Staters face every day. **Voters saw right through it and rejected her agenda by nearly 10 points.**
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251221_1.xxZvgv&refcode=em20251221-1&t=2&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)
Unfortunately that race turned into a national audition. Now the same talking points and spin that New Hampshire voters dismissed are being used daily from the White House briefing room.
So if you’re wondering how the rest of the country ended up having to listen to Karoline Leavitt, it’s because New Hampshire proved something important first: Her extreme ideas don’t hold up when you put them in front of real voters.
But that hasn’t stopped the MAGA machine from trying. **National Republicans are pouring money into New Hampshire because they think they can break through and notch a win here to cling to their Senate majority.** They’ve lined up behind John Sununu, an NRSC-backed candidate who will vote with Donald Trump and MAGA leadership when it matters most. It’s a new candidate reading from the same old playbook.
I’ve beaten their playbook before by focusing on kitchen-table issues, standing up for families, and telling the truth. **[Now I need your help to do it again. Will you chip in $5 today to help us keep this Senate seat blue and fight for what matters to Granite Staters?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251221_1.xxZvgv&refcode=em20251221-1&t=3&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)**
Granite Staters value independence. They reward common sense. And they don’t like being sold a script written somewhere else.
If you believe New Hampshire should keep leading the way and showing the rest of the country that MAGA politics don’t work here, I’m asking you to be a part of our campaign. **If Democrats are going to flip the Senate, we need to win this open race in New Hampshire.**
**[Will you chip in today to help us keep this Senate seat blue and stop national Republicans from installing another vote for Trump’s agenda?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251221_1.xxZvgv&refcode=em20251221-1&t=4&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251221_1.xxZvgv&amount=5&refcode=em20251221-1&t=23&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)**
Thanks for being in this fight with me.
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251221-1&t=24&refcode2=4151_582294_Yr3FHk&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=26&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4151%2E582294%2EYr3FHk)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

Their plan puts violent criminals first. ❌ Open borders ❌ Open ballots ❌ No voter ID ❌ No citizenship checks at the ballot box. All while hardworking American families and the police who protect them lose their freedom and security. This isn’t just politics , Unless we fight back, they will get away with letting every violent criminal and illegal alien prey on the American people. | | We need leaders who stand with our police, our Border Patrol, and our Constitution. I am one of them. I’m Adriana Guzmán Fralick – a LEGAL immigrant who loves this country . . . A conservative fighter for YOUR America First values . . . Washington won’t save us, the fight belongs to us Patriots. And our ENTIRE COUNTRY is on the line if these Democrats can stand in the way of OUR agenda of DEPORTING criminal illegal immigrants, securing our elections,and making our communities SAFE AGAIN! of dangerous illegal aliens FLOODING our ballot boxes. | | Time is running out. Will you stand with me and President Trump to defend our elections, support our police, and secure America’s future? | | Paid for by Adriana for Nevada | | P.O. You fired Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and stopped their reckless open-border agenda. **But the people they smuggled in are still here -- and they're still threatening Americans.**

**Among Biden 's imported Afghan nationals:**
🚨 A radical Islamist ambushed National Guardsmen blocks from the White House
🚨 A child sexual predator was arrested for "using force" against kids in Wisconsin
🚨 An ISIS terrorist was caught planning an Election Day massacre in Oklahoma City

Biden promised these people were **"fully vetted heroes." That was a lie. At least _55_ of his Afghan evacuees had hits on the __terrorist watch list__ -- and he let them in anyway.**

Biden and Harris' open border policy imported chaos that is scattered across America, threatening our communities, our children, and our troops every single day.

**President Trump stopped migration from dangerous countries and launched mass deportations. But he needs Congress and Conservatives to finish the job.**

That's why we're backing critical reforms to supercharge deportations: **dedicate** ICE to immigration removals, **strip away** bureaucratic obstacles, and **target** employers who exploit illegal immigrant labor.

name: =?utf-8?q?Trump=E2=80=99s_plan_to_silence_us_via_Our_Revolution?=
subject: They're coming for No Kings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

The far-right has put a target on Our Revolution’s back. Trump and
Republicans in Congress are working overtime to try to scare us into
submission by cracking down on organizations like ours. And now they’re
coming for our right to protest.

Senator Ted Cruz introduced a bill designed to threaten, prosecute, and
silence those who fund and power the peaceful “No Kings” protest movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34900?source=email-20251221&t=1011&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Headline: 'Cut off the money': Ted Cruz targets funding behind 'No
Kings' protests

It’s clear why: Cruz and the MAGA base KNOW that our massive No Kings
movement poses a real threat to their power. So they’re trying to hand
Trump and his cronies the power to ban organizing, scare allies, and chill
free speech. It’s a blatant attack on our rights and we need to OVERWHELM
Congress with opposition RIGHT NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34900?source=email-20251221&t=1012&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Take action: Tell Congress now, Reject the dangerous "Stop FUNDERs Act"
and protect our right to protest.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34900?source=email-20251221&t=1013&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]ADD YOUR NAME

As our movement gears up for another No Kings Day in 2026, Ted Cruz has a
sinister plan to stop us.

He went on national TV, smeared our nonviolent protests as “riots,” and
demanded Congress pass his “Stop FUNDERs Act” to allow Trump to prosecute
people for *funding* peaceful protest. It’s completely chilling, but we
refuse to be intimidated.

If we let this bill pass, we ALL could lose our right to support causes we
believe in – or simply speak out. This is not a drill. It’s about the
millions of people who have been the conscience of our democracy – and who
could be at risk of prosecution just for organizing for justice.

The good news is we can still defeat this. But only if we raise our
voices, NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34900?source=email-20251221&t=1014&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]We need to act quickly and urgently to shutdown Cruz’s bill before it
becomes law. Send an urgent message straight to your members of Congress
NOW: Protect the First Amendment—SAY NO to the "Stop FUNDERs Act"

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34900?source=email-20251221&t=1015&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]ADD YOUR NAME

It’s more important than ever that we turn out in record breaking numbers
for the next No Kings Day protest in 2026. And as Our Revolution ramps up
our organizing to make it happen, we WILL NOT stand by and let Cruz or
Trump’s other cronies stop us. But we need to raise our voices together to
stop this bill before it’s too late.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251221.XrD9wS&t=1007&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251221.hbFW23&t=1008&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251221.nwc0Xd&t=1009&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251221.rhi_wY&t=1010&akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9994%2E5885482%2EfRZiSy

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e) Hey, did you miss our email regarding Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson in your inbox?

We emailed YOU _specifically_ to add your name to our petition to stand with Justice Jackson against Trump, because we knew we could count on a good Democrat like you to step up.

[_**But you never responded?!**_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=3&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)

[**So, we are reaching out again to make sure that it gets through this time.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=4&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)

Justice Jackson is fighting back against Trump’s far-right conservative Supreme Court and she needs to know that we stand behind her!!!

[**Add your name to our petition now to stand with her and fight back against Donald Trump and his authoritarian power grabs →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=5&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=6&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
| [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=7&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
---
Hope to see your name this time,

Fight For Reform

-—---FORWARDED MESSAGE—----

[ **LOOK, you need to see this →→→ ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=8&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
[ [**REMARKABLE: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson is FIGHTING BACK against Trump’s far-right Supreme Court after they ruled to limit the power of federal judges in favor of Donald Trump.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=10&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)

[**Team, we NEED to let Justice Jackson know that we AGREE and couldn’t be more proud of her! Sign our petition now to stand with Justice Jackson >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=11&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e) ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69362?t=9&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e) | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=12&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
---
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=13&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
[ **Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson is calling OUT Trump’s Supreme Court: **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=14&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=15&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
* * *
Donald Trump is acting like a [**DICTATOR**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=16&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e) and Brett Kavanaugh, Amy Coney Barrett, and Neil Gorsuch are empowering him every step of the way.

Over and over again he pushes the boundaries of the law and then [**DEFIES**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=17&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e) the rulings of judges simply because he doesn't agree with them. [**It’s totally illegal, and Donald Trump shouldn’t be above the law.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=18&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)

[**The stakes are high, team. If we don’t fight back against these authoritarian tactics RIGHT NOW, our democracy will be at serious risk of collapse. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=19&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
[ **If you agree with Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, add your name to our petition now to stand with her and fight back against Donald Trump and his authoritarian power grabs → ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=20&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
[ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71093?t=21&akid=23750%2E4449941%2Eb3BK9e)
---
If we fail to act now, we could lose everything.

In this together,

Fight for Reform

subject: Trump says sign language intrudes on his “image”

body:
| | | **This isn't just nonsense, it’s f’d up.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mCt6gt3nev0IDvPxYqGlK4P24QsgmVAMhGXEWSqUv8Zx8XGgsp4Fc4vwO5CLGIl27cIGosQZnwDKkfTDttoAWvAEFMNqgBzaThfUy_q20FIZ413Z6RWb_Wh0L5_jvmiXrU-BrufMqDY-9_Ai15ZYJvYBrixqF3hAKHqnt0y4WlJr66LMgo3CuA8e1xyBb2rOCZWjuHtDboyXO46ziczOma28plCXEzmPeRbOjOJZ1srfrgB7OXkcKPqMY48vpwUXrNzhQuypOLsQEPshJyuNoufAoDY0iWLpt6pZbL2aAt2vTbauqYVtSUS7XZ1pXb4yQ0/4mm/KaPl0rufTD-7U4P8gKj_7g/h0/h001.wu8mg2Fg3xVazObUgleoibm9dA_FldhmWSzkbPKKfUw)******[Please chip in whatever you can to help us elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will STOP this cruel fool!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAQcHBGZTQyASHdftBqMbHvaM67lJJs1zDETiQ2AQ3s9Kej1bPopPTeswETTx3Jz83gIjRu7Wbe1oEVMv_AA8gpNfkcVCx2-xx2A2imjQonNgj5Ng0P4cPOJJFWdbZI5YM4WDSf8X048D_x4QP7vIek5ZdkgCCA10p9cvklqcrrzNTnSj3-UIdqJ2kqlhR3ycX8uv2DYWXgb6WzGgAyoPJ7t6FnAso-t9kDEyR-IPRLm5VakFBMMloaX75FQpMIeQGm9yEbpT0HXJlkBJsBTGSNSfj29lve9m94hvgnGrr86az8RzviMdqsk0bACeS3_8w/4mm/KaPl0rufTD-7U4P8gKj_7g/h1/h001.Vll_K1vvoNE40sDTByzRwSD7vZFS32GON6l_3oDsOfY)**
* * *
**** Trump is arguing that real-time American Sign Language (ASL) interpretation for White House briefings “severely intrudes” on his ability to control his image. _Unbelievable._ This isn't about image control, it's about exclusion and deception. It's a shocking admission that the fundamental rights of Deaf Americans are considered less important than Trump’s deplorable political image. This is a direct attack on dignity, access, and the spirit of the Americans with Disabilities Act. **This is what Able Dems exists to fight. We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stand up to these attacks and ensure every American has equal access and a voice.** **[We need champions in office who understand that our rights are non-negotiable. Will you donate $10 today to help us elect candidates who will stop Trump’s assaults on our community?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAXTZvBaxwdbCtQWh1rQQdr_KIPOty4KESIlpqVCWOOyGrFYDup1IROXnzbOsUfcM09CyPt6ntISCBuwSxMiF3OQg6CnVM_T99R8TSdUbsbswZ319Y8JTicTpbM6j-Pt-tm16oCA25ixvb8WnvCrWbCiEvU91P0GJo1Cdgru6HV4D91g_3OLpy5zGSDf1IEIxs7uuE1nd_HgeTimvOSyxVUYUTK-Hx4vb5-YAJxZpVUHXEsWybBD91Q6tBv9OY9jpIz7uEgqfB3STXkBG4me2PneSQELcNKm1NOOdC_KOo-g8d4w4KfYGzl_8AwCQVmhgY/4mm/KaPl0rufTD-7U4P8gKj_7g/h2/h001.ZOS4cywIPryENbtb2CtfRcCA8V3FzOKa8hJGVUG2aQk)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | This isn't just nonsense, it’s f’d up. Trump is arguing that real-time American Sign Language (ASL) interpretation for White House briefings “severely intrudes” on his ability to control his image. Unbelievable. This isn't about image control, it's about exclusion and deception. It's a shocking admission that the fundamental rights of Deaf Americans are considered less important than Trump’s deplorable political image. This is a direct attack on dignity, access, and the spirit of the Americans with Disabilities Act. This is what Able Dems exists to fight. We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stand up to these attacks and ensure every American has equal access and a voice. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Trump’s. Image. Is. Junk. What he’s really saying is that sign language interpreters hinder his ability to lie to the public. Every dollar helps us put a Democrat who is a true disability advocate on the ballot. ** Thank you for standing with us. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: The VoteVets PX
subject: NEW HAT: 250 - STILL NO KINGS - BLUE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
We’re tired of everybody burying this story. It’s time to get loud about it. Because when these scumbags get rich, Veterans will die. The only way we can stop that is by coming together and forcing them.
#
250 years, Peter.
That’s a lot to be proud of — no matter who sits in the White House. We’re going to celebrate our democracy next year by giving MAGA members of Congress the boot and retaking our majorities. And while we’re doing it, we’ll be wearing this hat.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19362?t=1&akid=34830%2E3013755%2EZwxxNK)
Trump might think he’s a king. He’s known for delusions of grandeur and a penchant for gold. But there are still no kings in the United States, and there never will be if we do our jobs next year.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19362?t=2&akid=34830%2E3013755%2EZwxxNK)
[**If you haven’t given up on our country yet and you’re ready to make sure every boot licking MAGA weirdo knows it, pick up your hat here. Use the code FREESHIP25 so you can ship it home for free.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19362?t=3&akid=34830%2E3013755%2EZwxxNK)
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19362?t=4&akid=34830%2E3013755%2EZwxxNK)
But move quick, because these are going to go fast.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19362?t=5&akid=34830%2E3013755%2EZwxxNK)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: 30 years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Immigrants like me understand the promise of America, which is why I know we can do better
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2006%2E791427%2EuL0Na0)
Friend, this year marked a huge milestone for me. Thirty years ago, my family came to America.
I was born in Somalia and raised in a refugee camp after my family was forced to flee violence and instability. I came to the US as an asylum-seeker and eventually earned my citizenship.
Of course, there were many roadblocks along the way. Legal hurdles, financial hardship, xenophobia, and bullying, to name a few. But my family and I persevered, and I am proud to now represent my community here in Minnesota in Congress.
**Immigrants like me understand the promise of America, which is why I know we can do better,** and why I fight for a better future for ALL of us, every single day.
We can be a country that rejects the fear and hate of the far-right. We can guarantee healthcare, stable housing, and a quality education for everyone. We can do big things like tackle climate change and rebuild public infrastructure.
And yes, we can be a country that continues our legacy of welcoming immigrants from around the world who are looking for a better life just like I was.
These are long-term goals, I know that. But that’s why we’re building a grassroots movement – a movement that can endure through Donald Trump or any other obstacle to deliver on our vision of prosperity for all.
**[If you share that vision of the future, I am asking for your support today. Chip in $10 or whatever you can as we continue to build a movement to defeat the far-right and create a better world for ALL of us, and not just the wealthy and privileged few.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251221-1-180&t=2&akid=2006%2E791427%2EuL0Na0)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-dec25.z7r62N&refcode=em251221-1-180&t=21&akid=2006%2E791427%2EuL0Na0)**
---

| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-dec25.xPu-sM&refcode=em251221-1-180&t=22&akid=2006%2E791427%2EuL0Na0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-dec25.SOaSGj&refcode=em251221-1-180&t=23&akid=2006%2E791427%2EuL0Na0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-dec25.Ca6d55&refcode=em251221-1-180&t=24&akid=2006%2E791427%2EuL0Na0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-dec25.1AVmrx&refcode=em251221-1-180&t=25&akid=2006%2E791427%2EuL0Na0)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-dec25.Wu8Lla&refcode=em251221-1-180&t=26&akid=2006%2E791427%2EuL0Na0)**
---
****
America is and has always been a nation of immigrants. It’s now our job to make sure that everyone enjoys the safety, respect, and dignity they deserve. I hope I can count on you to join me in that fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: The Angry Democrat: Matt Diemer
subject: This Week Was Loud, Petty, and Completely Unserious
body:
Outrage won, substance lost, and nobody should be surprised.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..24NGwJaKVE9-6M3PZpe0h69i83aFbR8sY451nMeT4Lk?) for more
---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVhbmdyeWRlbS5jb20vcC90aGlzLXdlZWstd2FzLWxvdWQtcGV0dHktYW5kLWNvbXBsZXRlbHk_.7gddnVtFk6hKgoibIwb-Vube4j8_bamNPaWfexrURkU?)
---
We need to find other **ANGRY DEMOCRATS.** Please consider sharing and subscribing to fuel the ANGER for change.
* * *
# [This Week Was Loud, Petty, and Completely Unserious](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=182240431&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMjQwNDMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjYzMzQ2OTgsImV4cCI6MTc2ODkyNjY5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.voZhdmtVMFBvVisR0_Quv4yf4pdUjF1hzx6aYqqE4-U)
### Outrage won, substance lost, and nobody should be surprised.
| | [The Angry Democrat](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)
---
| Dec 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=182240431&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMjQwNDMxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjMzNDY5OCwiZXhwIjoxNzY4OTI2Njk4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzE1OTI1OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IlFAQTiOLhSWA2eSnQZ7NpCpLxkVCNbQtkUSX8mxzU0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=182240431&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMjQwNDMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjYzMzQ2OTgsImV4cCI6MTc2ODkyNjY5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.voZhdmtVMFBvVisR0_Quv4yf4pdUjF1hzx6aYqqE4-U&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=182240431&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMjQwNDMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjYzMzQ2OTgsImV4cCI6MTc2ODkyNjY5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.voZhdmtVMFBvVisR0_Quv4yf4pdUjF1hzx6aYqqE4-U)
---
| | [](https://substack..j8b5QH2Innm41m3mRHMGyEoke6ED3Ee7z643sZTPlrU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mattdiemer/p/this-week-was-loud-petty-and-completely?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This week felt like a perfect snapshot of where American politics actually is. Loud. Petty. Performative. And deeply unserious.
Everything I am going to touch on has already been covered elsewhere. Nothing news breaking. This is simply my read on what mattered to me this week and why.
Thank you for being a subscriber to _The Angry Democrat_. Posting will slow down a bit through the holidays and into New Year's, but trust me... We Still Angry. 2026 we are going to be Big Mad.
### The Rob Reiner Tweet and the Attention Economy
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/525d655f-6459-42b8-916b-7b0701753761?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I want to start by saying this clearly. I do not enjoy talking about Donald Trump as an individual. It is a distraction to policy and progress. Running on anti Trump messaging alone without substance is not a winning platform.
We are living in an attention economy, and Trump understands it better than almost anyone in politics. Attention is the currency. It does not matter whether it is good or bad. What matters is that people are looking.
Jake Paul said in an interview I watched years ago that the worst thing that can happen to you isn't criticism. It is silence. Trump operates entirely on that principle.
For nearly a decade now, Democrats have run the attack Trump's character playbook. Mock him. Moralize against him. And then act confused when it does not move voters.
Most people do not vote based on whether a politician is polite or crude. They vote based on whether their lives feel better or worse. and if that person is talking about issues to make their lives better or worse. That is the part Democrats keep refusing to internalize.
What bothered me about the Rob Reiner tweet was not that it was offensive. It was that it was unserious. This constant posture of inflammatory language is performance.
We have had public figures shot. We have escalating political violence. And yet people who brand themselves as serious adults feel entitled to pour gasoline on the discourse because it feeds the algorithm.
This is not organic. I subscribe, at least partially, to the dead internet theory. A significant amount of online outrage is manufactured by think tanks, political operatives, bots, and incentive structures designed to provoke anger or dopamine responses. Outrage travels better than discussion. Sex and resentment outperform competence.
The Reiner tweet did exactly what it was designed to do. It generated backlash. It generated engagement. It fed the machine.
That is the tragedy. We would never be rewarded for doing better, because better is not what the system incentivizes.
* * *
### The Presidential Walk Is Just Petty & Unserious
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae07f280-cffc-4742-8c2e-5475c250a45f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The descriptions now posted under presidents in the White House are the same thing we were talking about with the Rob Reiner post. This is not governance. This is not messaging strategy. This is not rallying a base around accomplishments or policy wins. It is trolling from the seat of power. It gains attention. Because it is drama and entertainment.
We could be focused on wars, inflation, healthcare, or the actual release of the Epstein files, the White House is choosing to manufacture drama...because drama is the product and you/we are the consumers.
The algorithm does not reward progress. It rewards conflict. It rewards spectacle. It rewards irritation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a77eeb9c-93ef-4a09-a315-bafde5995181?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Auto Pen is Pretty Funny However
* * *
### Bernie Sanders and the AI Moratorium
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d0ffb294-a075-413b-83c3-7b83c012115c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Bernie Sanders is calling for a moratorium on data centers and AI expansion.
Fine. Let's take that idea seriously and follow it to its logical conclusion.
Let's stop competing.
Let's admit publicly that we no longer care about being a technological leader. Let China outpace us. Let other countries dominate emerging industries. Let them build the infrastructure, capture the productivity gains, and shape global standards.
That is the argument.
Countries can exist without being number one. France, Germany, Japan, Italy all do just fine. They have identity, pride, and relevance without dominating the world.
So why not America?
Why does anyone need to run on progress at all? Why not run on preservation? On maintaining the status quo? On stopping innovation entirely?
Let's pause AI. Pause robotics. Pause space exploration. Pause gene research. Pause medical innovation. Pause automation. Pause infrastructure upgrades.
Let's just make content. Movies. Streaming shows. Entertainment. Consume. Repeat. (which all funny enough need data centers)
If you stop playing the game, you stop losing.
Here is the uncomfortable part. That message resonates. A lot. People are tired. Risk feels scary. Change feels destabilizing. Stagnation feels safe.
But stagnation is not neutral. It is surrender.
### The Epstein Files and Congressional Cowardice
* * *
## [The Epstein Files: The Litmus Test for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/5d355f6e-be86-4477-a35d-af1cedf3c018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [The Angry Democrat](https://substack.com/profile/102996536-the-angry-democrat)| | *
---|---|---
| Nov 13
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5d355f6e-be86-4477-a35d-af1cedf3c018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Next week, Congress will face one of the most important votes in modern history; whether to release the Jeffrey Epstein files. Make no mistake: this is a litmus test for whether Congress will actually do the will of the people or continue to protect the powerful.](https://substack.com/redirect/5d355f6e-be86-4477-a35d-af1cedf3c018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/5d355f6e-be86-4477-a35d-af1cedf3c018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Epstein files remain the clearest litmus test for whether Congress is willing to do the will of the people.
This is one of the rare issues with overwhelming bipartisan public support. People want transparency. They want names. They want answers.
Congress knew exactly what would happen. Redactions were not an accident. The absence of clear unredacted language in legislation was not a mistake.
I have written about this before, both federally and here in Ohio. Omissions are power. Vague language is a shield. If lawmakers wanted full disclosure, they would have required it explicitly.
They did not.
That tells you everything you need to know.
Who are they protecting?
This was not incompetence. It was design.
* * *
This week was not about policy. It was about incentives.
Attention beats substance. Outrage beats solutions. Stopping feels easier than building.
If that is the political ecosystem we are going to accept, then we should stop pretending we are surprised by the outcomes.
As always, I want your pushback, your disagreement, and your perspective. Not applause. Not slogans. Just honest discussion.
* * *

name: Melanie Stansbury
subject: We need more Emerge women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Emerge taught me how to tell my story, build a campaign, and serve with integrity.

| Peter,

I’m Congresswoman Melanie Stansbury, an Emerge alum from New Mexico, and I’m reaching out personally with a simple request:

[_**Please support Emerge before their end-of-year deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121720688/590366938/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-12-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NDljMDgwLTgyZGUtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UGX-EGv4ZyP1TNcOEbqTZuuAGLwEOkQs2orKRrw6m1I=)

After 2016, I applied to Emerge because I knew I had to fight back against Donald Trump and MAGA extremism. Emerge taught me how to tell my story, build a campaign, and serve with integrity. **But I’ll be honest: this Congress is a mess. Every day I think, “This is NOT normal.”**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121720689/590366939/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-12-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NDljMDgwLTgyZGUtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UGX-EGv4ZyP1TNcOEbqTZuuAGLwEOkQs2orKRrw6m1I=)
We are dealing with conspiracy theory hearings, manufactured chaos, and colleagues who know better but have abandoned their own values. Every day, it’s women who hold the line — women grounded in community, reality, and service.

We need more of them. _A lot more._

**Right now, there are 13 of us Emerge alums in Congress, and next year, Emerge has a chance to double their congressional caucus.

[_Will you donate before December 31 to help Emerge train the next class of women who will help flip the House, fix this chaos, and fight for our democracy?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121720690/590366940/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-12-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NDljMDgwLTgyZGUtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UGX-EGv4ZyP1TNcOEbqTZuuAGLwEOkQs2orKRrw6m1I=)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AI billionaires are buying both parties
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In a massive giveaway to Big Tech billionaires at the expense of your
utility bills, Donald Trump just issued an executive order to stop states
from regulating artificial intelligence (AI).

Trump’s order gives his administration sweeping power to sue states in
order to overturn their laws meant to protect our utility bills, workers,
children, consumers, and our environment from the negative impacts of AI.
Plus, it threatens to cut federal broadband internet funding for any
states that don’t bend the knee.

But it’s not just Trump cozying up to Big Tech companies: House Minority
Leader Hakeem Jeffries announced a new Democratic commission on AI, which
will “develop policy expertise in partnership with the innovation
community” – aka give the AI and Crypto lobby whatever they want.

Naturally, the Democrats appointed to co-chair this commission are in the
pockets of Big Tech and AI corporations, including NC-04 Rep. Valerie
Foushee, who’s being challenged by Justice Democrats-endorsed Nida Allam
in our first Democratic primary of the cycle in March. Here’s what the
American Prospect had to say about Foushee on the committee:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251221.J8ySZz&refcode=em20251221-37297&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37297%2E1203867%2EcyMg5j ]Screenshot from The American Prospect: “Foushee is a member of the
corporate-friendly New Dems, and helped craft their “innovation agenda,”
which opposes broad regulation of the AI industry and instead calls for
working with AI companies to build “consensus for next steps as lessons
are learned” and “regulate incrementally.” Foushee also partially owes her
2022 victory in a crowded Democratic primary to almost $1 million in
outside spending from super PAC Protect Our Future, funded by
now-imprisoned cryptocurrency mogul Sam Bankman-Fried.”

As Sludge reported, “The panel’s leaders rank among the House Democrats
with the deepest ties to Big Tech and AI, from holding millions of dollars
in tech stock to the contributions they’ve raised for their campaigns and
the Republican-backed deregulation bills they've signed onto.”

Once again, as billionaires threaten our costs, our jobs, and our planet,
the corporate Democratic establishment is trying to figure out how to cozy
up even closer with them.

We need to retire the members of this Party who work overtime to protect
the profits of Big Tech billionaires.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251221.J8ySZz&refcode=em20251221-37297&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37297%2E1203867%2EcyMg5j ]Help us unseat Foushee and other corporate Democrats selling us out to
Big Tech: pitch in $5 or more to fuel our 2026 primary
campaigns now →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251221.J8ySZz&refcode=em20251221-37297&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37297%2E1203867%2EcyMg5j ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251221-37297-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37297_1203867_cyMg5j&akid=37297%2E1203867%2EcyMg5j

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37297%2E1203867%2EcyMg5j

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
