name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW PATRIOT PACK with ACCESSORIES
body:
** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=6b53bff7f4&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=848447bd65&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=95b1dea9cb&e=fbf55fa623

For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.

8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot.
Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn.
NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE
"OPERATION NEVER TELL"

The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=3b75ac457b&e=fbf55fa623) , and once these are gone, they’re gone.

Don't miss this cigar!

NEW CIGAR ACCESSORIES!
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=ff25800089&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=09f63c2e89&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=24608efad9&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=2c059d7476&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=0195a08030&e=fbf55fa623

** FREE Shipping On Orders Over $100.00
------------------------------------------------------------

name: Roy Cooper HQ
subject: Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE expanding voting rights?
body:
Answer a one-question poll for Roy Cooper >>>
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)
**[Take Roy Cooper’s Poll: Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE expanding voting rights>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_votingrightspoll_122125/?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRightsPETRESEND_122125&t=7&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)** Peter, this country is supposed to be governed by the will of the people — the people’s voices, and votes, are supposed to choose our leaders and direct our future. But that cannot happen if some of us aren’t able to cast our ballots and have an equal say. Voting rights are under attack here in North Carolina and across the country, and our democracy itself is at risk as a result. Extreme Republicans have proposed and passed restrictive laws that make it harder for some Americans to vote. **Meanwhile, Roy Cooper will fight to expand access to the ballot box so every voter can have their say._We want to know where you stand:_** **[Let Roy know your answer to this question: Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE expanding access to the ballot box?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_votingrightspoll_122125/?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRightsPETRESEND_122125&t=8&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)** | [SUPPORT](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_votingrightspoll_122125/?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRightsPETRESEND_122125&t=9&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3) | [OPPOSE](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_votingrightspoll_122125/?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRightsPETRESEND_122125&t=10&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)
---|---
Thank you for registering your opinion!
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=200%2E124072%2EA85iQ3)

name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: It’s “debated”? Really?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251221-61007&t=1001&akid=61007%2E1407376%2ET20Zj- ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251221-61007&t=1002&akid=61007%2E1407376%2ET20Zj- ]Demand Justice PAC

At a recent Senate Judiciary Committee hearing, something chilling
happened.

When Senator Blumenthal used his entire line of questioning to ask
judicial nominees about the 2020 election and January 6, the responses
were damning.

Over and over again, the nominees hid behind evasive language about
“certification,” refusing to acknowledge basic, indisputable facts of
history.

When Senator Blumenthal pointed out that nominees weren’t actually
answering the question, one responded with “I can’t give any further
commentary.”

Then came January 6:

When asked directly whether the United States Capitol was attacked on
January 6, a nominee outright refused to answer, saying “it’s debated.”

That’s when Senator Blumenthal called it exactly what it was:

“These are basic facts... If you are so much in fear of answering these
questions, how will you have the courage to be a fair and impartial judge
who follows the law without fear or favor?”

It’s true. If you can’t say who won the election, and if you can’t say the
Capitol was attacked, then you have no business holding a seat on the
federal bench.

Demand Justice is on the front lines exposing these nominees, pressuring
the Senate to vote no, and working to stop election deniers from being
confirmed. That fight only succeeds when grassroots supporters like you
step up.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20251221.kYJ_sD&refcode=em20251221-61007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61007%2E1407376%2ET20Zj- ]Chip in $5 to Demand Justice today to hold the line and
defend the rule of law. The truth shouldn’t be controversial, and
democracy shouldn’t be optional.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20251221.kYJ_sD&amount=5&refcode=em20251221-61007&t=1022&akid=61007%2E1407376%2ET20Zj- ]Donate $5 ››

In solidarity,

Demand Justice PAC

| [ Full Shocking Footage ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=75dd81274f404a04bdfe5d3a3cc49566&_e=dd2Vc1DExonEnakA61lfyhVjoFMvr1sWXgBPrqWbfSkgup7JR7nwFWKpBJ1fO1SsHiLsPtm91Z2hX7-XZtmb_DVnYhiQ-KZlIHoLNau1oA-XF2hrXTLcvlWz2PKMZ3joa2ls_XkhCcPv86SVZjfY-L-rSYEPFXdzuBeN9UoMGIuhXmqSuuxOdVKl-rJPNCcmF6ht40hfW1cIzXNKRMTRcuKm50lH6PiYVYzW1WrSObXHs7kym-IsP7b5F8j11exQDpRpjdTBBjilqmkd022gYb0cnPrHZj3xH6-Xs2gxADnmFKu8Y-YwLmUv0fx3PCTecmcth3d0OHnfU4e93OZUKWFu-UvdRRc6Uuv-PDemqOGgoHXKUF65OqXnk9aN5Dh2KCJ3vqOUs0c6xgsbbObrnt1cfOdTq3i6sdMRAw7NnhmK5xEyh-sqaCgCYEEpWzbegfsrgopXulLjDXhkfepyQwr_p_4yPdsW4psO644aggyxlYxgAay7DaifiqvLJRz-tksxdds1LhCDpzT6vS0-hQu5ve2Jqsrc0cOP_HIvu0lq65cCYOQxPS8LKRK5HCawjxik1oXT5WbhvHHjvshWxA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

[Watch the full shocking footage now](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=75dd81274f404a04bdfe5d3a3cc49566&_e=dd2Vc1DExonEnakA61lfyhVjoFMvr1sWXgBPrqWbfSkgup7JR7nwFWKpBJ1fO1SsHiLsPtm91Z2hX7-XZtmb_DVnYhiQ-KZlIHoLNau1oA-XF2hrXTLcvlWz2PKMZ3joa2ls_XkhCcPv86SVZjfY-L-rSYEPFXdzuBeN9UoMGIuhXmqSuuxOdVKl-rJPNCcmybCvhtjilUFUhIGys8mUjpUm5cdzkpiK9iG8ZjmnXUw2GMrpxORpmyRamrkw1L7ENGwp-AqJB-IhtAXxBbuc6UIBl7HjXQ-U-t7OKMR8GDQBc7KRix0QO3anGOTPnqtaxiyABxW9Hgwa2Q_WpYn2Lrjkjf0dT6wCjbuvg8ISNR3hGTQUhQHeXqLV7uXd83Np_r13v5NUUHMkvUaoH9vNUlAPupSGCPVOAmeyOxZb2zdIGs1__uPM6P8waabRXtu8LGVddmgVljAYmxkdsyTHJ3cPXtESIZu-oe2a1vio1q5Gec2gM7S2x1QuGxIj8yYNxSZe4XOMJLJzba62iORjWf4IgxzL3y47H5K4Wj40MGjUXKFGcrS9FNUynScxd2ODfNBjsbCuMAa_vdtmvq5dFg%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: Cameras rolled in stunned silence as something utterly unprecedented unfolded right before the crew's eyes, leaving them speechless.| | | | December 21 | | | | | Caught On Camera: Cybertruck's Jaw-Dropping Shock | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. clean_body: To win, we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH | | Reader,I'm pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column. In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country - and there are many. Our nation has lost its way. Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead. | | | | But it's the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I've never seen it so bad. For this reason, I 've chosen The New York Sun as a partner.It's a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years. It's a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values. It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.It remains our nation's most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of "paper of record" but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens. Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.To win, we need you to join us. To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America. Membership starts at just 1 cent per day. | | | | You'll have access to my commentary, alongside some of the sharpest editorial minds in the country.Don 't wait - join today! | | | | | Newt Gingrich Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States ****. ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\})

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Political consultants and pundits didn’t think this was possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1440%2E251025%2EdaLvzI ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1440%2E251025%2EdaLvzI ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Something remarkable is happening in this campaign — something political
consultants and pundits didn’t think was possible.

Our campaign, funded entirely by grassroots supporters, is statistically
tied with our MAGA Republican opponent, Mike Rogers.

[ A ]A graphic showing Abdul is statistically tied with Mike Rogers

Meanwhile, our primary opponents, including the establishment’s favorite,
are either neck-and-neck with Mike Rogers or falling behind.

That tells a clear story about what voters are responding to, and why this
moment matters.

People aren’t looking for another politician who triangulates or waits to
see which way the wind blows.

They’re responding to a campaign that actually stands for something — one
that is bold, honest, unbought, and unafraid to fight for Medicare for
All, tax the billionaires, and end our complicity in genocide.

That’s a feat the old guard politicians would’ve said was impossible.

This team is proof
that a people-powered movement can compete and win in a state as critical
as Michigan.

But we can’t slow down for a second. If we want to win this primary and
reshape what the Democratic Party stands for, we have to keep firing on
all cylinders.

When a campaign like ours shows this kind of strength, the establishment
takes notice. So do the billionaires. And when they feel threatened, they
pour in money fast.

If we don’t match their surge with grassroots power, we risk losing the
momentum we’ve built.

So, here’s my ask: [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251221-1-ak.c6UaOS&amount=10&refcode=em20251221-1440&t=1004&akid=1440%2E251025%2EdaLvzI ]Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to
help us prove that a 100% people-powered campaign can beat both the
establishment and the MAGA machine?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251221-1-ak.c6UaOS&amount=10&refcode=em20251221-1440&t=1023&akid=1440%2E251025%2EdaLvzI ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you for taking a moment to read this important message. I’m so
grateful to have you on our side.

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1440%2E251025%2EdaLvzI
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1440%2E251025%2EdaLvzI

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Marc Elias
subject: Let me explain... -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey there, it's Marc Elias.

For years, I've gone to court to stop Trump and defend democracy -- and I've won 64 times. **Now, working with the DSCC, we're doing our part to safeguard voting rights, uphold the rule of law, and protect your freedom.**

But I won't lie: Trump's actions put all that work at risk -- and we need to fight back NOW. [**Support from grassroots Democrats like you is what powers the fight to flip the Senate so Democrats can put a stop to Trump's extremism. Will you give $5 to the DSCC to help us stop Trump's allies by winning back a Democratic Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251221-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251221-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=22108%2E9716520%2EZKhZEx)

Let me explain further:

Donald Trump is ignoring due process and openly mocking the courts. He's threatening the very foundation of our democracy by attacking fair, free, and secure elections. And he's going after voting rights -- the very bedrock of our democracy.

Worst of all, Trump has a seemingly **endless** supply of fools and cowards in the Republican Party who are willing to help him.

But the DSCC and I are fighting back: The _moment_ Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten voting rights, we filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats nationwide. And the good news is, we've already notched some key victories in the case!

**But the fight isn't over yet. Donald Trump is an aspiring despot -- not just for a single day -- and despots _never_ willingly give up their power. We have to take it from them.**

Winning the Senate is the first step, and Democrats need to flip just four seats to claim the majority and wrest power away from the GOP.

**As I've said before, the fight for democracy is the fight of our generation.[Right now, the best thing YOU can do is chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand in this fight with me to unseat Senate Republicans and elect a Democratic Senate majority the first chance we get >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251221-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251221-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=22108%2E9716520%2EZKhZEx)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The current health care system is completely unsustainable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251221-5725-footer&t=1001&akid=5725%2E420207%2EVrOts- ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter, have you
seen this yet?

Earlier this week, Politico reported on the poll we conducted, which was
the largest national survey on Medicare for All in years.

The results were very clear: across party lines, Americans are saying that
the current for-profit health care system is broken, unaffordable, and
stacked in favor of insurance companies and Big Pharma — not patients.

And Medicare For All is the answer.

I’m bringing these polling results to my colleagues in Congress because we
have a real chance to meet this moment and fight for a health care system
that puts people over profits.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251221.gUvOxt&refcode=em20251221-5725&amount=3&t=1002&akid=5725%2E420207%2EVrOts- ]If you’re with me, will you pitch in $3 to help support
my work to deliver on universal health care?

Thank you for your support, and make sure to read more below if you missed
our email earlier this week!

— Pramila Jayapal

-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Team Pramila
Subject: NEW POLL: Medicare For All is broadly popular

Peter,

We just conducted the largest national poll on Medicare For All in years
and the results are in:

The people want Medicare For All.

Our polling, which was reported in Politico this morning, shows that a
solid majority of voters — including independents, an overwhelming 90% of
Democrats, and even 1-in-5 Republicans — support universal health care.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251221.gUvOxt&refcode=em20251221-5725&t=1003&akid=5725%2E420207%2EVrOts- ][IMG]

Pramila is taking these findings and will present it to members of
Congress, but we wanted to give you the inside scoop first.

We found that voters, particularly in battleground districts, believe the
current corporate, for-profit health care system is failing. 42% of voters
spend over $300 a month on routine health care costs and 65% believe the
federal government does too little to help people afford their health
care.

Pramila’s poll also proves that Medicare For All candidates WIN in some of
the most competitive districts. A Medicare For All Democratic candidate
beats out a Republican by 52% to 46% in some districts where Trump won
just last year.

If Democrats want to meet this moment and win, we have to take a bold,
unapologetic stance in favor of Medicare For All. We have to say clearly
that we are ready to take back control of our health care system from
insurance corporations and Big Pharma, and finally deliver universal
coverage that works for everyone.

Pramila has been one of the leading champions of Medicare For All because
she’s always believed that health care should be a human right, not a
privilege for the wealthiest few. [ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251221.gUvOxt&refcode=em20251221-5725&t=1004&akid=5725%2E420207%2EVrOts- ]If you’re with her in taking on the
insurance companies and Big Pharma so we can finally deliver on universal
care, please pitch in to support our campaign today.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251221.gUvOxt&amount=3&refcode=em20251221-5725&t=1023&akid=5725%2E420207%2EVrOts- ]Contribute $3

Thank you.

— Team Pramila

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251221-5725-footer&t=1024&refcode2=5725_420207_VrOts-&akid=5725%2E420207%2EVrOts-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5725%2E420207%2EVrOts-

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

name: Tim Walz
subject: I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251221-331&t=1&akid=331%2E34582%2ENPLXve)
Peter,
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made together for Minnesota. In my time as governor, we’ve:
🍴 Made breakfast and lunch free for students in Minnesota
🏥 Provided paid family and medical leave for all Minnesotans
💵 Slashed taxes for working Minnesotans
There’s so much more I could list, but I don’t have the space in this email.
The point is: we’ve shown what we can accomplish when we come together, as One Minnesota, and fight for folks across the state.
**But this is all under attack. MAGA Republicans running for governor are seeking Donald Trump’s endorsement and have plans to tear all of this progress down. We can’t let it happen, Peter.**

Tim Walz

In my time as governor, we’ve: 🍴 Made breakfast and lunch free for students in Minnesota 🏥 Provided paid family and medical leave for all Minnesotans 💵 Slashed taxes for working Minnesotans There’s so much more I could list, but I don’t have the space in this email. The point is: we’ve shown what we can accomplish when we come together, as One Minnesota, and fight for folks across the state. But this is all under attack. MAGA Republicans running for governor are seeking Donald Trump’s endorsement and have plans to tear all of this progress down. We can’t let it happen, Peter. I’m grateful, Tim Walz Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The fight doesn’t start in the middle of an election year. It starts now.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251221-1753-foote&t=1001&akid=1753%2E342411%2EWKE_Zv ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

2026 is right around the corner — and Trump and the far-right are already
coming for our progressive champions.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and so many others are under attack
every single day, and we know exactly why: they won’t back down, and
neither will we.

The fight doesn’t start in the middle of an election year. It starts now.
Every bit of support today doesn’t just help — it multiplies our impact.
That means more communities mobilized and more power to fight back before
the attacks hit. That’s how we protect the Squad. That’s how we win.

We don’t rely on billionaires, corporate PACs, or special interests. We’re
powered by people who believe in bold, progressive change. That’s what
keeps the Squad fearless, accountable, and unstoppable.

To keep our champions in the fight — speaking truth to power, fighting for
bold progressive change, and standing up for justice on all fronts — we’re
asking:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251221-movement.eewqD1&refcode=em20251221-1753&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1753%2E342411%2EWKE_Zv ]Will you chip in $20.26, or whatever you can afford, to the Squad
Victory Fund today? Every dollar you give now goes further than it ever
will later, because it powers the movement to defend our champions in
2026.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/20212?c0=svfem-20251221-movement.2y3Cnf&refcode=em20251221-1753&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1753%2E342411%2EWKE_Zv ]Contribute $20.26 ››

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251221-movement.eewqD1&refcode=em20251221-1753&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1753%2E342411%2EWKE_Zv ]Contribute Other ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1753%2E342411%2EWKE_Zv

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, 2026 is right around the corner — and Trump and the far-right are already coming for our progressive champions. Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and so many others are under attack every single day, and we know exactly why: they won’t back down, and neither will we. The fight doesn’t start in the middle of an election year. It starts now. Every bit of support today doesn’t just help — it multiplies our impact. That means more communities mobilized and more power to fight back before the attacks hit. That’s how we protect the Squad. That’s how we win. We don’t rely on billionaires, corporate PACs, or special interests. We’re powered by people who believe in bold, progressive change. That’s what keeps the Squad fearless, accountable, and unstoppable. To keep our champions in the fight — speaking truth to power, fighting for bold progressive change, and standing up for justice on all fronts — we’re asking: [ ]Will you chip in $20.26, or whatever you can afford, to the Squad Victory Fund today? Every dollar you give now goes further than it ever will later, because it powers the movement to defend our champions in 2026. [ ]Contribute $20.26 ›› [ ]Contribute Other ›› In solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund

name: Michael Bennet
subject: This shouldn't be controversial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |
---
Team,
People often ask why I'd leave the Senate to serve as governor of Colorado. It's simple: **to best protect Colorado from Trump and MAGA Republicans' destruction, and to make it the best state to live, work and raise a family.**
And despite what the GOP would have you believe, I'm really not talking about anything crazy.
I think it’s reasonable that if a person works hard, it should pave the way to an affordable and secure middle-class life within their own lifetimes and afford their children even better opportunities.
It’s rational that their kids should be able to graduate high school with the 21st-century skills they need to make a good living and continue to reside in their home communities, regardless of whether they get a college degree or not.
It's only right that, in the richest country on earth, access to health care should not rely on zip code, income or job type – and that you shouldn't have to choose between lifesaving prescriptions and groceries.
I believe that we have a responsibility to build opportunity for one another and the next generation. That's not radical, friend. It's in the opening of the Constitution –**it's common sense.**
I am not running for governor to be courted by industry lobbyists or to see my face on TV. I am running for governor because right now, Colorado faces real challenges – and as long as the GOP holds both majorities in Congress, we can't wait on Washington to deliver the remedies we need. The most effective fixes will have to start here in Colorado, with Coloradans.
So if we're going to make Colorado the best state to live, work and raise a family, then we've got our work cut out for us. It starts with winning this race.
Corporate megadonors don't fund campaigns like ours. They fund politicians who protect their interests – like extremists who stoop to fallacies and fearmongering.
**But reaching our $100,000 end-of-quarter goal will allow us to hit the ground running in 2026 with the resources to build a winning campaign. **That's why, with our last public fundraising deadline of 2025 just ten days away, I'm humbly asking:
**_[Can you please make a contribution to my campaign to keep us on track to hit our end-of-quarter goal by the Dec. 31 midnight deadline? clean_body: | | | Friend, Kate here. I wanted to check in with you from the ground now that we are almost through the final month of the year. Update: We have $2,290 left to raise with just TEN days to go to hit our target. This is the stretch where campaigns either build the momentum they need for the fight ahead... or fall behind. And I’ll be honest: what happens next depends on every supporter stepping up right now. | | | | I get to see Jeff in action nearly every single day. I see how he fights for Colorado—not just when the cameras are rolling, not just when it’s convenient, but in the long, exhausting hours no one ever sees. He shows up. He never quits. And he does it because he believes in the people he serves. Now it’s our turn to fight for him. We’re pushing toward a critical year-end goal that will set the tone for 2026. If even a fraction of supporters chip in tonight, we’ll close the gap and power Jeff into the new year with the strength he’s earned. | | | | Thank you for being part of this team. I certainly appreciate all that you do. KateTeam Hurd | | Paid for by Jeff Hurd For Congress Copyright © 2025 Jeff Hurd For Congress Our mailing address is: Jeff Hurd For Congress 2695 Patterson Rd, Suite 2-287 Grand Junction, CO 81506 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . You can also reach us at mailto:info@jeffhurdforcolorado.com.

Peter,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4823337a767487193ddc1cfd36e7e67&_e=I41lZ9n5ubYuF_JGKoNxOdMX6mKNJKZrXkTICUeHAh8thZsw7RqhVsZDFR-mQB5kQXex34zEVc0uUmMEQSFgQYh8pNPL7taCFdUewIwVZxx1Na8ZUS7gH7gaJTnV2If9SNLstGyt5Nt4tF4tztNWBZZM9UOnrFkySGQ2H5RLiKg9yC4OW9ozcrFKNGOzMRRr6tYFgPFcgLw21JkCugiNHz1Xx0DnNcVwu5wUs1RdLLI87sJTTXAbrUmUyYoUe52k249fX85KR5_aRMGgO8UG05n9yI4Ca5hb4sX82Cdth7NLIMnhjLTNZcBZQERQ_VWNH0W9NzMcU6ks7iIHVfp2PwRupoZjJD2pFdCfW4Ie8RmudqgT0xc2WOp5gy0BWbQWNo_Jd2fu8xvC0--NcqKZtFfRr5QZ9eT7BkRI1FxNWySMT1-tRMhQOssqpXtP_sY25n79HetZIYIDRax-Zc-TbUuS8_gCoZX-QwVdOXm-TsyG8d-tNwDiqpq366DwhPAFeJU7AS4JHYS8skALS2IDq9CYC6pXR0gK01P4HqyyWcQRZQw3kyz-ZrebMbN-9XODh9BE67i1-sTqYIb70VWc3RZlZ7vKtMP8M-VJF4Z92eJ5qr160qxT5nwK3Bek8jl_SqOV8uDiVBfqTJp35C05PA%3D%3D)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d4823337a767487193ddc1cfd36e7e67&_e=I41lZ9n5ubYuF_JGKoNxOdMX6mKNJKZrXkTICUeHAh8thZsw7RqhVsZDFR-mQB5kQXex34zEVc0uUmMEQSFgQYh8pNPL7taCFdUewIwVZxx1Na8ZUS7gH7gaJTnV2If9SNLstGyt5Nt4tF4tztNWBZZM9UOnrFkySGQ2H5RLiKg9yC4OW9ozcrFKNGOzMRRr6tYFgPFcgLw21JkCugiNH_1M56pbsPz_OuJ0TDoixxDe4hvBfn-OdlDev7N8cpNIEJpxX6__wF8GHV4PcsBTFjEGQp1xS7kyJGg4iNHsZ31nTADmNYeEYGWhSWhVWqdsRPs9CUZW-tkw1Qcf31XZL-pdq3RxiY_DDSp2goiJ7QRPzuBjdlvVjXiVRT6KPW2KoKddgeTUGHrodyddyoOFi3oBSt3HF4kK9RbIfEJ9LU2jHfEyn__ySWfdX4hqJK3NBFjzQm1oPtXExacwyDqQolgemkPxcVqy2LaY94k8cdFQKbySVdoTeF_joG1FEmmYNog2vGUvWtwwztggHzGO5p6glM6OQYppbe6v7pYfeLt5p06AtMcJGpBhnAEi0NtKpbCULOgGiSlt2Pkfg7h0aZRDHcXVkiOloYGJEbEnhKRR0gB-zvKIczH1PekRs2RBxyvterCjEpv6qPZSxrvMOw%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Peter, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Senator Maggie W. Hassan
subject: This is about my son, Ben -

body:
This is Maggie Hassan. I’m outraged.

I’ll tell you why: RFK Jr. continues to push radical conspiracy theories, dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric, and attacks on folks with disabilities.

I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that folks like my son, Ben — who was born with cerebral palsy — would have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121730585/590394810/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.21_Ben-New_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzQxNjgzMi05MGRlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEYlcQijoMBMNR6cpXDEF1izOnBl1ZaxfnwRM94PmXM=) Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and RFK Jr. attacking key rights and protections for people with disabilities, that mission is more important than ever. name: Powered by People
subject: Meet Becky, Sol-Angel, Mary, John, and Melissa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240552%2E444211%2E8j-Do9)
Meet Becky, Sol-Angel, Mary, John, and Melissa—just a few of the supporters powering change with Powered by People. Here’s why they give:
**Becky:** "I'm a retired public school teacher, and I want to make a difference. I taught Social Studies, and now I'm actively involved. I can't just sit back and do nothing."
**Sol-Angel:** "The outreach to unite and inform is good. Also, it's time to topple the Republican stranglehold in Texas. It's ruining the state and its people."
**Mary:** "I think it is critical to register young voters and to encourage Democrats to run for office—whether it be on school boards, city government, the state legislature, or Congress."
**John:** "The work Powered by People conducts is critically important for representative democracy. Grassroots organizing is one of the most noble and essential activities."
**Melissa:** "I think the work of connecting with people, registering voters, and forming a coalition is our only hope."
People like Becky, Sol-Angel, Mary, John, and Melissa are making this movement possible every single day. Their support—$5, $25, or $50 at a time—helps us register thousands of new voters, equip volunteers with the tools they need, hire organizers in more communities, and build the people-powered movement Texas needs.
It’s their belief—and yours—in the power of everyday Texans that fuels our work. Real change happens when Texans show up and do what they can, when they can.
[**Will you join them today with a $3 contribution to Powered by People’s organizing work? Together, we can make sure every Texan has a voice, every community is heard, and our movement keeps growing stronger.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251221.7IrE6A&refcode=ema20251221-240552&t=3&akid=240552%2E444211%2E8j-Do9)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Something extraordinary happened just 24 hours after Trump returned to office... | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Something extraordinary happened just 24 hours after Trump returned to office... name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Can I count on you, Peter??
body:
$15, Peter.
That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to help us reach our $25,000 goal and win in Ohio. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3] Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $X you ever spent?
I know that $15 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.
But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $15 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.
With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.
So please, Peter, will you chip in $15 or more to Real Texas PAC and me today to help reach our $25,000 goal, power this campaign forward, and win in Ohio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3&amount=25]
Thank you,
Sherrod Brown
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Support gun safety legislation to protect our nation’s children
disclaimer_text: paid for by the gun lobby who would rather peddle a “guns everywhere” agenda than keep our kids safe
body:
Gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens in America.
#

Friend -
Gun violence is the leading cause of death for kids and teens in America.
More than drug overdoses. More than car accidents.
**Gun violence is number one.**
This horrifying statistic shows the stranglehold that the gun violence epidemic has on our nation. How many more children must die before Congress takes action? We must do better for our children, for our future.
That’s why we’re starting a petition to call on our members of Congress to pass transformative legislation to keep our kids safe from gun violence.
[**Will you click here to add your name today and demand that our elected officials take action to protect our children from gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/Kids_Petition_sv//?source=em251221-1-b&refcode2=11130.3935704.ApzI31&akid=11130%2E3935704%2EApzI31)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/Kids_Petition_sv//?source=em251221-1-b&refcode2=11130.3935704.ApzI31&akid=11130%2E3935704%2EApzI31)**
To protect our kids, we must pass safe storage laws to ensure gun owners properly store their firearms so that their children cannot access them and accidentally injure themselves or others.
We must pass background checks on all gun sales at the federal level to make sure we’re keeping guns out of the wrong hands, like people convicted of violent felonies.
We must pass extreme risk protection order (aka “red flag”) laws to prevent school shootings before they occur. Our kids should be able to attend school without fear of being a victim of another mass shooting.
However, we’re up against members of Congress bought and paid for by the gun lobby who would rather peddle a “guns everywhere” agenda than keep our kids safe.
**We cannot be silent. Children are dying and we must do something.**
[**Please team, sign on today to demand that Congress has the courage to protect our children by prioritizing gun safety legislation.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/Kids_Petition_sv//?source=em251221-1-b&refcode2=11130.3935704.ApzI31&akid=11130%2E3935704%2EApzI31)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/Kids_Petition_sv//?source=em251221-1-b&refcode2=11130.3935704.ApzI31&akid=11130%2E3935704%2EApzI31)**
Thank you for using your voice. If we work together, we can be a better, safer nation.
\- The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/63914?t=1&akid=11130%2E3935704%2EApzI31)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=11130%2E3935704%2EApzI31) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It's time to fight like hell
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Don’t make the mistake of thinking this is just about me. It’s about every person who has the courage to speak out against Trump. Trump wants all of us living in fear, and I don’t intend to let him win.
#

Team: I’m writing to ask you for $5.
That’s right: just $5.
$5 because we’re under enormous pressure right now.
$5 because Donald Trump wants to stamp out any and all opposition, and he’s willing to undermine your First Amendment rights to do it.
$5 because he’s sent his lapdog, Pete Hegseth, after me, and he’s moving ahead with a sham investigation to drag my name through the mud and destroy everything I fought for during my 25 years in uniform.
Don’t make the mistake of thinking this is just about me. It’s about every person who has the courage to speak out against Trump. Trump wants all of us living in fear, and I don’t intend to let him win.
It’s time to fight like hell. I need your help to do it.

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

I’ve been in the arena before. I know how to fight for Illinois families — and I know how to deliver. Together, we passed Obamacare and expanded access to affordable healthcare for millions. We lowered costs, strengthened our economy, and proved that practical, problem-solving leadership works.

Now, as families face rising costs, threats to personal freedoms, and a lot of chaos in Washington, **I’m fired up and ready to get to work — because I’ve done this job before, and I’m ready to do it again.**

Momentum is building behind our campaign. I’m proud to have the support of leaders like Senator Tammy Duckworth, Rep. Steny Hoyer, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, and members of Illinois’ congressional delegation — and now the New Dems are standing with us too.
**But endorsements don’t win elections — people do.** It’s going to take a strong grassroots push to reach voters across IL-08 and keep this campaign moving forward. **[Can I count on you to chip in today and help us build on this momentum? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121732495/590399838/1618486275?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20251221_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjNhZTZlOC05NmRlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=97HJPCVfdgTRgGDpYfdO2dbdypbWmuTO-UsQ0LYFPgE=)**

# [Oracle's tumble is a warning for investors they should heed](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4720068&post_id=182014496&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMDE0NDk2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjYzNDA1NTAsImV4cCI6MTc2ODkzMjU1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ3MjAwNjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XfCn3UrWwUZZtgOivDmXQng4YKwS2X6qK3UQgXGWD8Q)
### Oracle is staying true to its name sake. It is revealing hidden knowledge to us.
| | [The Capitalist](https://substack.com/@capitalistmag)
